title: DM Setter/Appointment Setter via Social Media
description:
NOW HIRING — Instagram DM Setter (Virtual Assistant) | Coaching & Mentorship

Remote | Full-Time | Philippines-Based | Performance Bonuses



ABOUT THE ROLE



We are a fast-growing coaching and mentorship company helping individuals unlock their full potential and expand their professional opportunities. We are looking for a driven, detail-oriented Virtual Assistant to serve as our Instagram DM Setter — the first point of contact for potential clients and the bridge between our audience and our coaching team.

This is not a copy-paste spam role. We are looking for someone who is genuinely curious, emotionally intelligent, and skilled at having natural conversations that uncover whether someone is the right fit for what we offer.



WHAT YOU'LL DO



Your primary responsibility is to initiate and manage Instagram DM conversations that identify qualified leads — individuals who could genuinely benefit from our coaching program.



Reach out to and engage with target prospects on Instagram daily

Build genuine rapport through natural, thoughtful conversation

Ask strategic questions to identify and confirm the Big 3 qualifiers (see below)

Book qualified leads onto the calendar for a strategy call with our team

Track all outreach, conversations, and bookings in our CRM / tracking sheet

Follow up with warm leads who haven't yet booked

Report daily metrics and conversation updates to the team

Maintain a professional, consistent tone that reflects our brand voice





THE "BIG 3" QUALIFIER FRAMEWORK



A lead is only considered a QUALIFIED CALL when all three of the following qualifiers are confirmed within the DM conversation. Each qualified call earns you a $10 bonus — paid in addition to your base monthly salary, with no cap on how many you can earn.

QUALIFIER #1 — Age & Eligibility

The prospect must be a high school student or older. Our target market is 16–22 years of age. This ensures they are at a stage in life where our coaching can make a meaningful and lasting impact.

QUALIFIER #2 — Belief in Untapped Potential

The prospect must have expressed, in some form, that they believe their current results don't reflect what they're truly capable of. This can sound like: "I feel like I have more in me," "I know my velocity could be better," "I'm not operating at my ceiling," or anything of similar nature.

QUALIFIER #3 — Expressed Frustration or Motivation to Improve

The prospect must have clearly expressed a desire or frustration tied to improving their situation — whether that's career, income, performance, mindset, or overall opportunities. They want more, and they're ready to do something about it.

All three qualifiers must be confirmed before booking. A call that does not meet all Big 3 criteria will not count as a qualified call and will not earn the $10 per-call bonus. Quality over quantity — every bonus you earn should be one you're proud of.



KPIs & PERFORMANCE EXPECTATIONS



DMs Sent Per Day — Minimum: 80+ | Top Performer: 120+

Response Rate — Minimum: 20%+ | Top Performer: 35%+

Qualified Calls Booked Per Month — Minimum: 25 | Top Performer: 40+

Lead-to-Call Conversion Rate — Minimum: 5%+ | Top Performer: 10%+

Response Time During Shift — Minimum: Under 10 min | Top Performer: Under 5 min

KPI reviews occur at 30, 60, and 90 days. Consistent underperformance on core metrics will be addressed with a performance improvement plan before any further action.



SCHEDULE & HOURS





Full-time position: 40 hour weeks, shifts listed below under "Typical shift".

Hours: Central Standard Time (CST) — our target audience is most active in the afternoon and evening

Typical shift: 4:00 PM – 10:00 PM CST Monday-Friday, 2:00 PM - 10 PM CST Saturday (40 hours a week). Morning hours see little to no engagement as our target audience (student-athletes) is in class and not active on Instagram during these times

You are expected to be online, responsive, and active during your full shift

Weekend coverage may be requested occasionally and will be compensated accordingly

We actively monitor activity during your shift. If hours are missed without prior notice, pay will be reduced accordingly for that time. In the event of a power outage, internet issue, or other circumstance outside your control, we are not responsible for pay during that lost time — however, you are welcome to make up those hours over the weekend to retain your full weekly pay





COMPENSATION & PAY SCALE



Starting Rate — $450/month base | $7 bonus per qualified call

30-Day Review (25+ qualified calls) — $475/month base | $10 bonus per qualified call

60-Day Review (25+ calls/month consistently) — $500/month base | $10 bonus per qualified call

Top Performer / 90-Day Review — $500/month base | $12 bonus per qualified call

HOW BONUSES WORK:

You earn $10 for every qualified call booked from day one. After your 30-day review, if you have consistently booked 25 or more qualified calls per month, your bonus scales to $12 per call. Top Performers who reach the 90-day milestone earn $15 per booked call. Bonuses are tracked weekly and paid out monthly alongside your base pay. There is no cap on the number of bonuses you can earn.



WHO WE'RE LOOKING FOR





Excellent written English communication skills — natural, warm, and professional

Experience with Instagram and social media engagement (DM outreach experience is a strong plus)

Comfortable having real conversations — not just copy-pasting scripts

Detail-oriented with strong follow-through — you track everything

Self-motivated with the ability to work independently during your shift

Reliable internet connection and a distraction-free work environment

Familiarity with Google Sheets, CRMs, or any tracking tools is a plus

Previous experience as a VA, appointment setter, or sales support role preferred





HOW TO APPLY



To be considered, please do ALL of the following when submitting your application:



Write "I read the full job description" at the top of your message.

Briefly describe (2–3 sentences) why you'd be a great DM setter

Share any relevant experience with Instagram outreach, appointment setting, or sales support

Include your availability and confirm you can work CST hours (2:00 PM – 10:00 PM)

Attach your resume or relevant portfolio



IMPORTANT: Write "I read the full job description" at the top of your message. We will not respond to messages that miss this request as an organization. This is our first test of attention to detail — a non-negotiable skill for this role.



We look forward to finding our next great DM Setter. If you're hungry, consistent, and love connecting with people — this role is for you.

title: Security Operations Specialist
description:
Role Overview

American Medical Compliance is seeking a highly detail-oriented Security Operations Specialist to support our cybersecurity and regulatory compliance initiatives. In this role, you will act as the primary executor of our security and compliance controls, working directly with the CISO in a Maker-Checker framework. You will be responsible for performing critical administrative tasks, maintaining security systems, and generating audit-ready evidence to support our SOC 2 Type II, ISO 27001, and HIPAA compliance.



Job Details:

Schedule: Mondays to Fridays; 8 AM to 4 PM Mountain Standard Time

Work type: Full-time; Work from Home set-up

Start Date: ASAP



Key Responsibilities (Maker Functions)

• Compliance Evidence Generation

Execute and document technical controls required for SOC 2 Type II, ISO 27001, and HIPAA, including: 

o Access log reviews 

o Encryption verification 

o Audit trail validation 

• Jira Administration

Serve as the primary administrator for Jira: 

o Design and maintain workflows 

o Configure permission schemes 

o Manage service desk projects 

o Ensure all IT and compliance activities are properly tracked and auditable 

• User Lifecycle Management

Manage provisioning and de-provisioning of user access across systems: 

o Enforce the Principle of Least Privilege 

o Ensure compliance with HIPAA access control standards 

• Infrastructure Administration

Support cloud and on-prem environments by: 

o Performing credential rotations 

o Applying security patches 

o Monitoring system health and availability 

• Security Documentation & Audit Readiness

Maintain a centralized audit evidence repository: 

o Capture screenshots, logs, and reports 

o Ensure all activities are properly documented for external audits 

• Administrative & Security Operations Support

Perform day-to-day IT and security administrative tasks while ensuring: 

o Full traceability of actions 

o Proper documentation for CISO review and approval 



Required Qualifications

• Experience 

o At least 2+ years of experience in a Security Operations, IT Administration, or Compliance-focused role 

o Hands-on experience supporting SOC 2, ISO 27001, and/or HIPAA environments 

• Jira Expertise 

o Strong experience in Jira administration 

o Ability to build workflows, manage permissions, and configure custom fields 

• Security & Compliance Knowledge 

o Solid understanding of: 

? Data privacy and protection 

? Risk management practices 

? Security controls in healthcare or regulated environments 

• Documentation & Attention to Detail 

o Strong documentation discipline 

o Ability to produce audit-ready evidence consistently 

• Audit Support Experience 

o Experience preparing for or supporting third-party audits is highly preferred 



Preferred Qualifications

• Experience working in healthcare, BPO, or compliance-driven environments 

• Familiarity with cloud platforms (e.g., AWS, Azure, or GCP) 

• Relevant certifications (e.g., Security+, ISO 27001, or similar) are a plus

title: Long-Term YouTube Video Editor + Thumbnail Designer (On-Call / As Needed)
description:
I’m looking for a skilled, dependable, and detail-oriented YouTube video editor to join my team on an on-call / as-needed basis.



This is a long-term opportunity for the right person, but hours are not guaranteed each week. Work will be assigned whenever new videos are ready to edit. This role is ideal for an editor who already has other clients and wants to add a reliable, recurring client with clear standards and a straightforward workflow.



I’m looking for someone who takes pride in clean, professional edits and understands how to make educational YouTube videos engaging without overdoing effects.



What You’ll Be Editing



You’ll mainly be editing:



Talking-head educational and informational YouTube videos

Content focused on clarity, pacing, and audience retention

Videos that need to feel polished, professional, and easy to watch



This is not a flashy “MrBeast-style” editing role. I want edits that are clean, modern, and effective.



Responsibilities



Video Editing



Cut mistakes, dead space, long pauses, and filler words

Improve pacing to keep viewers engaged

Add clean zooms, jump cuts, transitions, and light motion when appropriate

Insert royalty-free background music where needed

Add simple on-screen text, graphics, or visual callouts when useful

Follow editing notes and brand style consistently

Deliver projects on time once assigned



Thumbnail Design



Create high-click, professional YouTube thumbnails

Use strong contrast, clean layouts, and readable text

Design with mobile viewers in mind

Match the tone and branding of the channel



What I’m Looking For



At least 2 years of YouTube video editing experience

Strong understanding of viewer retention, pacing, and storytelling

Experience editing talking-head, educational, or commentary-style content

Good eye for clean, clickable thumbnail design

Strong English comprehension

Reliable communication and quick response time

Detail-oriented and able to follow instructions closely

Open to feedback and committed to improving over time

Able to work independently without constant supervision



Technical Requirements



Stable internet connection

Quiet, distraction-free home workspace

Computer or laptop capable of smooth video editing

Willing to use TimeProof for time tracking



Job Details



Pay: $3 USD/hour

Type: On-call / As needed

Hours: Not guaranteed; depends on content production

Payment Method: PayPal

Location: Remote / Home-based



How to Apply



Please send the following:



Links to YouTube videos you personally edited

A short summary of your editing experience

The editing software you use (Premiere Pro, CapCut, Final Cut, DaVinci Resolve, etc.)

A few thumbnail examples, if available



To confirm you read everything carefully, start your application with the word: RETENTION



Important

This role is best for someone who wants a long-term working relationship, values consistency, communicates well, and can deliver solid work every time a project is assigned.



If you are dependable, creative, and understand how to make YouTube content more engaging while keeping it clean and professional, I’d love to hear from you.

Good English comprehension

Can work independently and stay organized



Technical Requirements



Reliable internet connection

Quiet home-based workspace

Computer or laptop capable of handling video editing smoothly

Willing to use TimeProof for tracking time worked



Position Details

title: Senior Graphic Designer / Junior Art Director — LA-Based Studio (Remote, Hourly)
description:
NO VIRTUAL ASSISTANTS PLEASE. and if you are wearing a suit in your picture, please do not apply.



Hi, I'm Peter Bae! Entrepreneur, creative director, and family man. I started a graphic design studio 5 years ago and we're growing. We work with tech companies, CPG brands, and mission-driven organizations that need consistent, high-level creative execution across branding, pitch decks, and marketing collateral.



We have an art director on the team. What we need now is a senior-level designer who can come in, hit the ground running, and own projects from start to finish. Monday through Friday, 4-6-ish hours a day, paid hourly.



*Who you are*

You have 5+ years of experience and a portfolio that does the talking. You pick up new brands quickly, work clean under pressure, and communicate clearly. You don't need hand-holding — you need a good brief, or just enough info, and room to do your thing.

You care about the craft. You sweat the details. And you want to be part of something that takes the work seriously without taking itself too seriously.



*What you'll work on*

Visual identities, logos, pitch decks, presentations, web design, mockups, social assets, print, and photo manipulation.



*Skills required*

Expert-level Photoshop, Illustrator, and Figma. Strong branding and design fundamentals. Sharp art direction instincts. Logo design ability. Web and UI design experience a plus. Photo manipulation is a plus.



*Expectations*

Communication that is proactive. Execution at your highest level. Work schedule is on your own time but we should have at least 2-3 hours of overlap for communication.



*What this can become*

I'm not looking for a one-off hire. I want someone who grows with the studio. As we scale, the right person will have real opportunities for more creative ownership, broader client exposure, and an expanded role. I take care of the people who show up for this team.



One more thing on culture

I pride myself on building a work environment where you feel appreciated and challenged in equal measure. We ask for excellence every day but we also make it an enjoyable work environment. You'll feel a level of humanness pretty quickly.



*To apply*

Share your favorite design resource or tool — inspiration, photography, references, whatever you actually rely on — that isn't Behance, Unsplash, Pexels, Dribbble, Same.Energy, or anything equally generic. Give me the one you keep to yourself.

Then send a portfolio link. Not a Google Drive folder. One or two links I can scroll through in a few minutes.



Serious inquiries only.



I look forward to meeting you!

title: Senior Product Designer (Medical Devices & Equipment)
description:
We are seeking a meticulous and visionary Product Designer to lead the development of next-generation medical equipment. You will be responsible for the end-to-end design process—from initial ethnographic research in clinical environments to production-ready CAD models. The ideal candidate doesn't just design beautiful products; they design safe, intuitive, and compliant user experiences that meet global regulatory standards.



Key Responsibilities

- User-Centric Design: Conduct contextual inquiries and usability testing with clinicians, patients, and caregivers to identify unmet needs.

- Industrial Design & Engineering: Develop high-fidelity 3D models (SolidWorks/Creo) with a focus on Design for Manufacturability (DFM) and assembly.

- Regulatory Documentation: Generate and maintain the Design History File (DHF), including design inputs, outputs, and verification/validation protocols.

- Risk Management: Lead UFMEA (Use Failure Mode and Effects Analysis) sessions to identify and mitigate potential use errors.

- Prototyping: Build functional prototypes using 3D printing, CNC machining, and soft-tooling to test ergonomic and mechanical hypotheses.

- Cross-Functional Collaboration: Work closely with Quality Assurance (QA) and Regulatory Affairs (RA) to ensure compliance with ISO 13485 and IEC 62366.



Required Skillset & Qualifications

- Education: Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Industrial Design, Mechanical Engineering, or Human Factors Engineering.

- Experience: 5+ years in product design, with at least 3 years specifically in the medical device industry.

- Technical Proficiency: Expert knowledge of 3D CAD (SolidWorks preferred), Adobe Creative Suite, and rendering software (Keyshot).

- Compliance Knowledge: Deep understanding of FDA 21 CFR 820.30 and ISO 14971 risk management standards.

Materials Expertise: Knowledge of biocompatible materials, sterilization processes (Autoclave, EtO), and IP-rated enclosures for clinical disinfection.



Preferred Attributes

- Experience taking a Class II or Class III medical device from concept through to 510(k) or PMA submission.

- A portfolio that demonstrates a "process-first" approach, showing sketches, research data, and failed iterations alongside final products.

- Strong communication skills to translate complex clinical needs into engineering requirements.



Please send you resumes ONLY at

title: Fractional Online Trainer – Cleaning Rockstar Program
description:
Important: We do not monitor OnlineJobs.ph messages or applications.



If you are interested in this opportunity, please apply at the link below:


/application-online-trainer-3944



Company Overview

Serenity Clean is a high-growth, eco-friendly home cleaning company on a mission to provide families with more time, peace of mind, and a spotless home. With a goal of 432 locations and 65,000 bi-weekly cleanings, our 200% “Make It Right” guarantee and commitment to sustainable, safe cleaning products have earned us a reputation for quality and convenience.



Role: Fractional Online Trainer – Cleaning Rockstar Program

Company: Serenity Clean

Location: Remote (Offshore)

Regular Schedule: Monday, Wednesday, Friday (M/W/F) — guaranteed

Additional Days: Tuesday and Thursday may be scheduled depending on training volume

Hours: 9:00 AM – 4:00 PM EST (includes 1-hour unpaid lunch, 6 paid hours/day)

Pay: $90 retainer per week (3 guaranteed days) — could be up to $150/week ($5/hour) if additional sessions are scheduled

Compensation Guarantee: Paid for all 3 regular training days, even if no sessions are held

Platform: Google Meet



About the Role

Are you ready to bring energy and impact to online training sessions? If you’re outgoing, a natural motivator, and know how to keep people engaged on Google Meet, we need you to lead our Cleaning Rockstars through their training.



This role turns training sessions into memorable experiences where every new recruit feels part of something meaningful.





What You’ll Do

- Lead by Example: Guide Cleaning Rockstars (CRs) through training with energy, encouragement, and motivation. Make sure CRs not only complete the training but are excited about it.



- Run the Room: Host interactive sessions where every CR feels seen and supported. Keep cameras on, smiles up, and engagement high.



- Teach the Tools: Help CRs get comfortable with Trainual, BookingKoala, Gusto Wallet, and Slack. Training will be provided.



- Cover Policies & Processes: Guide CRs through essential company processes and policies to ensure they thrive on Day 1.



- Facilitate Real-Time Testing: Lead assessments, review answers with the group, and support re-takes while keeping the rest engaged.



- Embody Core Values: Use our company values to guide CRs and model the culture during every session.



- Make it Fun and Engaging: Encourage questions, maintain a positive vibe, and add your personal touch. Training should be enjoyable and memorable.



- Be Ready for Anything: If CRs don’t show up, use your time productively updating materials, logs, or prepping for upcoming sessions. You’re still paid for guaranteed days.





Core Values

- Team First: We win together. Support each other, communicate clearly, and share the load.



- Own It: No excuses. Take responsibility, fix issues fast, and follow through.



- Details Matter: Inspect what you expect. Double-check your work and take pride in the small things.



- Ask. Don’t Assume: Clarity is our responsibility. Ask questions, check for understanding, and communicate clearly.



- Find Gratitude: Focus on the positive, even in challenging 
nts. Serve with purpose and joy.





Schedule & Compensation

- Guaranteed training days: Monday, Wednesday, Friday

- Optional training days: Tuesday and Thursday depending on training volume

- Hours: 9:00 AM – 4:00 PM EST (1-hour unpaid lunch, 6 paid hours/day)

- Pay: $90/week guaranteed for 3 regular training days, up to $150/week with optional sessions



What Makes You Perfect for This Role

- Engaging Personality: Confidently lead a virtual room and encourage participation.

- Clear & Confident Communicator: Strong English skills, professional and approachable.

- Tech-Savvy: Comfortable with Google Meet, Trainual, BookingKoala, and Slack.

- Reliable & Accountable: Solid internet, dependable attendance, and professionalism.

- Training or Teaching Experience: Helpful but not required—energy and clarity matter most.



Why Join Serenity Clean

- Guaranteed pay for all 3 regular training days/week even without training sessions

- Flexible schedule with optional extra days depending on training volume

- Positive, high-energy team culture

- Growth opportunity with a scaling, eco-friendly company



How to Apply

Apply here:

???? 
/application-online-trainer-3944



Serenity Clean is an equal opportunity employer. We welcome applicants from all backgrounds.

title: Digital Marketing Specialist - Travel
description:
Job Title: Digital Marketing Specialist 



Company: World Travel Limited (North Travel & TRVLR)



Location: Philippines (with annual travel to New Zealand and Metro Manila)



About Us:



We are a growing travel agency based in New Zealand, specializing in outbound travel from New Zealand & Australia to Africa, Europe, North America, Asia, South Pacific, and Australia. We are seeking a passionate and experienced Digital Marketing Specialist to join our team and help us achieve our marketing goals.



Job Description:



In this role, you will be responsible for developing and executing our digital marketing strategy across various channels, including social media,
 marketing, SEO, and content/video shorts creation. You will work closely with the Managing Director to ensure our marketing efforts are aligned with our business objectives.



Responsibilities:



+ Apply strong marketing principles to achieve marketing goals

+ Develop and manage marketing campaigns across various digital channels

+ Create and maintain a marketing calendar

+ Manage our WordPress website

+ Migrate one existing website from Squarespace to Wordpress (by 30 June 2024)

+ Utilize Zoho Campaigns/Zoho Marketing Automation to create and send
 marketing campaigns

+ Design and develop engaging
 templates

+ implement and analyze customer sales funnels and customer remarketing

+ Manage our social media presence on
, Instagram, LinkedIn, and YouTube

+ Create high-quality content using Canva (and other tools)

+ Conduct keyword research and implement SEO best practices

+ Write compelling copy for various marketing materials

+ Demonstrate a basic understanding of AI tools such as ChatGPT and Gemini



Personal Attributes:



Self-starter with a strong work ethic and initiative

Passionate about travel

Positive attitude and ability to work well in a virtual team environment

Honest and reliable



Skills:

Marketing Campaigns, Travel Marketing, Wordpress, SEO, Canva Design,
 Marketing, Keyword Marketing, Social Media Marketing, PPC marketing



Desired skills but not required:

CSS knowledge (or willing to learn)

HTML knowledge (or willing to learn)

Zoho/Zapier automation

Zoho Bigin



Other Requirements:



Willing to travel to New Zealand annually for company conferences (Flights, accomodations and visa paid for. Subject to job performance)

Able to travel to Metro Manila (if not based there) once a year for a half-year planning week

Possess a fast and stable fiber internet connection

Equipped with a good headset and professional home office setup

Have a reliable PC suitable for graphic design and WordPress editing tasks

Benefits:



The opportunity to work for a growing and dynamic travel agency

Competitive salary, reviewed half yearly and travel benefit package.

Be part of a passionate and supportive team

Work in a flexible remote work environment (with some travel required)

Opportunity to make a real difference in the company's success



We are an equal opportunity employer and value diversity at our company. We do not discriminate on the basis of race, religion, sexual orientation, color, national origin, gender, age, marital status, veteran status, or disability status.  



How to Apply:



Please submit your CV and a Word Document (.docx) answering the below questions:



• How would you rate your English language skills written and verbal?

• How proficient are you at using Office Suite applications such as Zoho Mail, Gmail or Outlook?

• Do you have experience in using any Zoho products? If so, which?

• How many years' experiences do you have in digital marketing?

• What is your experience level with Canva?

• Do you have experience in creating sales funnels/marketing automation workflows?

• Do you have CSS and HTML skills and can you provide 2 examples?

• Take a screenshot of your current internet speed showing time and date (paste below)?

• Take a screen of your PC specifications including date and time and paste below?

• Do you have a current Passport with more than 12 months validity?

• Are you willing to travel to New Zealand (subject to performance) in November 2025?

• What is your salary expectation?

title: Senior Cost Estimator
description:
Senior Construction Cost Estimator



Build Metric – Melbourne, Australia.



We are looking for an experienced Senior Construction Cost Estimator to join our growing estimating team.



Key Responsibilities



Prepare accurate bills of quantities (BOQ), marked-up plans, and professional quotes for residential and light commercial construction projects.

Develop estimates using client-specific rates, material costs, and margins.

Deliver high-quality estimates with a fast turnaround.

Mentor junior estimators and support team workflows.





About You



8+ years’ experience as a Construction Cost Estimator (residential and light commercial projects preferred).

Strong plan reading and take-off skills.

Proficient with estimating software (PlanSwift, ZZTakeoff).

High attention to detail and ability to work efficiently to tight deadlines.

Experience mentoring or guiding junior staff is highly regarded.



** DO NOT APPLY IF YOU DO NOT MEET THIS CRITERIA**



What We Offer



Strong hourly rate

100% Work From Home.

52 weeks per year, annual leave, public holidays and all over time fully paid. 

Supportive team environment with clear career progression.



If you're a skilled Senior Construction Cost Estimator looking for a professional role with better work-life balance, we’d love to hear from you.

title: Microsoft Dynamics 365 Sales Manager
description:
Role purpose: Identify, qualify, and progress new business opportunities for Microsoft Dynamics 365 solutions within legal services, education, and healthcare markets, generating qualified leads and supporting the sales cycle through to signed agreements in collaboration with our internal marketing, sales and technical teams.



Key Tasks & Responsibilities



Lead generation & prospecting: Source new opportunities via your network, outbound outreach, events/webinars, LinkedIn, partner channels, and market research.

Ideal Customer Profile (ICP) targeting: Focus on legal services, education, and healthcare organisations that align to agreed ICP criteria (size, geography, current systems, buying triggers).

Discovery & qualification: Run initial discovery calls to understand business objectives, pain points, current platforms, timeline, budget range, and stakeholders; qualify using agreed criteria (e.g., BANT/MEDDICC-style).

Stakeholder mapping: Identify decision makers, influencers, procurement, and technical contacts; maintain an engagement plan to progress the opportunity.

Solution positioning: Articulate the value of Microsoft Dynamics 365 (CRM/Customer Service/Sales/Marketing/Field Service and related Power Platform capabilities) in industry-relevant terms.

Appointment setting & handover: Book qualified meetings for internal sales/solution specialists; provide a complete handover pack (account background, needs, stakeholders, qualification notes, next steps).

Pipeline progression support: Stay engaged through the sales cycle—support follow-ups, coordinate stakeholders, and help remove blockers to keep momentum.

Pre-sales coordination: Coordinate demonstrations, workshops, and scoping sessions with internal resources; ensure the prospect is prepared and the agenda is outcome-focused.

Basic requirements capture: Capture high-level functional requirements and success measures; contribute to initial solution fit assessment (without delivering detailed technical design).

Commercial awareness: Support development of deal scope and commercial assumptions by sharing prospect context and services expectations; assist with proposal/Q&A coordination as needed.

CRM administration: Maintain accurate, timely updates in Dynamics 365 CRM (leads, contacts, accounts, activities, notes, stage, forecast, and next actions).

Reporting: Provide weekly activity and pipeline reporting, including lead sources, conversion rates, and expected close dates.

Compliance & confidentiality: Handle prospect and customer information responsibly; comply with applicable privacy, anti-bribery, and ethical selling requirements.

Continuous improvement: Share market feedback (competitors, pricing expectations, objections, feature requests) to improve messaging and go-to-market approach.



Expected Outputs



A consistent flow of qualified leads aligned to agreed criteria.

Completed discovery/qualification notes and stakeholder maps for each progressed opportunity.

Booked and attended introductory meetings with internal sales/technical teams as required.

Up-to-date CRM records and weekly activity/pipeline reporting.

title: Seeking an Experienced Social Media Video Editor (Short-Form / TikTok, Reels, YouTube Shorts)
description:
Join our fast-growing, award-winning PR agency as a Social Media Content Coordinator & Video Editor.



We create high-performing content for brands across industries, from doctors and thought leaders to hospitality and entertainment, and we’re looking for a detail-oriented, trend-savvy editor who knows how to make content pop. If you live on TikTok, understand what makes people stop scrolling, and can turn raw footage into engaging, high-converting videos, this role is for you.



What You’ll Do:

Edit 150+ diverse short-form videos per month with a tight turn-around (Instagram Reels, TikTok, YouTube Shorts)

Work from provided footage (b-roll, talking heads, skits)



Add:

On-screen text & captions

Trending sounds

Jump cuts, pacing, and transitions

Hooks that grab attention in the first 3 seconds

Follow creative direction + examples while also bringing your own ideas

Turn around edits quickly (often within 24–48 hours)

Organize files and content across multiple client accounts



What We’re Looking For:

Strong English communication (written + basic verbal)

Proven experience editing short-form social media content for a variety of brand industries

Deep understanding of:

TikTok & Instagram trends

Viral hooks and retention strategies



Proficiency in:

CapCut (required)

Canva/Adobe (must be knowledgeable in one or the other)

Project management tools like Trello or Later (preferred)

Access to iPhone 14 or newer (for quality checks + platform compatibility)

Highly organized and able to manage multiple projects at once

Reliable, fast communicator, and able to meet deadlines consistently



Bonus Points If You:

Have worked with agencies or multiple clients at once

Can suggest improvements to content (not just follow instructions)

Understand US-based trends, viral editing and storytelling

If you are a carousel content creator expert



Hours & Growth:

Part-time to start, with opportunity to grow into full-time

Consistent monthly workload

Long-term role with growth opportunities as we expand 



How to Apply (IMPORTANT):

To be considered, please include:

Links to 3–5 short-form videos you’ve edited 

A short message answering: What makes a video go viral on TikTok or Instagram?

Your availability (hours per week)

Your expected hourly rate 



**Applications without video examples will not be reviewed.**

title: Client Outreach and Appointment Coordinator
description:
Client Outreach and Appointment Coordinator



Remote, Philippines

Full Time, Long Term

Supporting Ottawa, Canada Automotive Operations



About the Role



We are hiring a results driven Client Outreach and Appointment Coordinator to support a busy automotive service operation based in Ottawa, Canada.



This is a performance focused role within the automotive industry. The primary objective is to generate and secure appointment volume through proactive outbound communication and disciplined CRM management.



You will play a key role in maintaining a steady flow of booked vehicles, supporting seasonal campaigns, protecting scheduling integrity, and ensuring strong customer follow up.



This is a long term, full time opportunity aligned with Eastern Standard Time business hours.



Work Schedule



• Full time, 40 hours per week

• Eastern Standard Time schedule

• Typical hours are 9:00 AM to 5:00 PM EST

• May start as early as 8:00 AM EST or extend to 6:00 PM EST depending on operational needs

• Fully remote role based in the Philippines

• Reports directly to the Canadian management team



Performance Expectations



This is an activity based and target driven role.



• Minimum average of 12 vehicles booked per day

• High daily outbound call volume

• Strong sense of urgency in all communication

• Accurate and complete CRM documentation

• Professional and confident English communication



Key Responsibilities

1. Appointment Booking and Confirmation



• Book a minimum average of 12 vehicles per day

• Promote preferred booking structure, 8:00 AM drop off and end of day pickup

• Confirm all next day appointments

• Reduce no shows through proactive confirmation calls

• Protect scheduling structure and revenue flow



2. Seasonal and Campaign Based Outbound Calling



• Execute winter and summer tire change campaigns

• Conduct air conditioning inspection campaigns

• Follow up on deferred repair recommendations

• Offer no charge multipoint inspections when appropriate

• Reactivate inactive customers



3. Tire Storage Customer Management



• Contact customers with stored tires to schedule seasonal changeovers

• Prioritize off peak booking to protect peak season capacity

• Align scheduling with revenue and capacity strategy



4. Database Clean Up and Lead Mining



• Verify and update customer contact information

• Clean incomplete or outdated CRM records

• Identify and mine new booking opportunities from the database

• Maintain organized and detailed CRM notes



5. Post Appointment Follow Up



• Call customers after completed appointments

• Collect structured and objective feedback

• Document feedback in Excel

• Categorize trends and identify recurring themes

• Report insights to management to improve service quality



Required Qualifications



• Fluent in English, spoken and written

• Experience in outbound calling, appointment setting, telesales, or customer outreach

• Comfortable working with daily targets and measurable performance metrics

• Strong organization and time management skills

• Proficient in Excel and CRM systems

• Reliable high speed internet connection

• Professional home workspace

• Available to work Eastern Standard Time hours



Ideal Candidate Profile



• Confident and persuasive communicator

• Highly disciplined and activity focused

• Comfortable making a high volume of outbound calls daily

• Detail oriented with strong documentation habits

• Results driven and accountable

• Able to work independently with minimal supervision

title: GHL Funnel Builder (Credit Repair + Coaching Business)
description:
JOB TITLE:

GHL Funnel Builder (Credit Repair + Coaching Business)





SALARY: $5 - $8  USD/hourly

HOURS: Full-time | 40 hrs/week | Mon–Fri

TIMEZONE: Must overlap US Central Time (CST) 9AM–1PM

TYPE: Long-term | Work from home



ABOUT THE ROLE





I run two businesses — a credit repair company (Make A Way Worldwide) and a coaching business that teaches people how to start and fund their own credit repair company. I need a GHL funnel builder to build and manage all the funnels for both.



This is a conversion job, not a design job. Every page you build will be measured by opt-in rate, booking rate, and sales. If you cannot track and improve those numbers, this is not the right role.



WHAT YOU WILL BUILD





For the credit repair company:

— Lead magnet opt-in funnel (free credit analysis)

— Credit score quiz funnel

—
 and Instagram ad landing pages

— Google ad landing page

— VSL (video sales letter) funnel

— Webinar registration funnel

— $27 tripwire / self-liquidating offer funnel

— VIP application funnel

— Referral partner sign-up page

— Client upsell pages (Credit Builder Bundle, monitoring, business credit)

— Win-back and reactivation pages



For the coaching business:

— Free training opt-in funnel (how to start a credit repair company)

— Webinar / masterclass registration funnel

— Course or program sales page

— Application funnel for high-ticket coaching

— Lead magnet funnel (free guide or checklist)

—
 list building opt-in pages



Ongoing for both businesses:

— A/B testing and conversion optimization

— Connect all funnels to GHL automations, tags, and workflows

— Install and verify
 Pixel on every page

— Weekly report on opt-in rates and page performance



WHAT I AM LOOKING FOR





Required:

-2+ years building funnels in GoHighLevel specifically

- Experience with lead gen funnels for service or coaching businesses

- Knows how to set up and verify
 Pixel events

- Builds mobile-first — always

- Has run A/B tests and can show real conversion data

- Communicates clearly and meets deadlines



Strong preference for:

- Experience with credit repair, financial services, or coaching funnels

- Understands message match between ads and landing pages

- Has built webinar and VSL funnels before

- Familiar with GHL automations (not required to build them, just connect funnels to them)



TECHNICAL STANDARDS



Every funnel must:

— Load in under 3 seconds (under 2 seconds for paid ad pages)

— Be fully optimized for mobile

— Have
 Pixel events firing correctly

— Be connected to the correct GHL workflow trigger

— Have zero broken links or placeholder text on delivery



COMPENSATION



$5- $8 Dollars a hour depending on experience

$50 bonus per funnel when it hits its conversion benchmark within 30 days

Long-term role — I am not looking for a one-time project





HOW TO APPLY



Your application must include all three of the following.

Applications missing any item will not be reviewed.



1. PORTFOLIO

Show me at least 2 GHL funnels you have built.

Include the opt-in rate or conversion rate for each one.

Screenshots from GHL or a live link both work.



2. LOOM VIDEO (2–3 minutes — required)

Walk me through your best-performing funnel.

Show the live page AND the GHL builder backend.

Tell me the conversion rate it achieved and what you did to get there.

Loom is free at 
. No Loom = no interview.



3. ANSWER THIS QUESTION

"A
 ad is sending traffic to a landing page.

The opt-in rate is 7%. I want 30%.

What are the first 3 things you check or test and why?"



Send everything to: 

Subject line: Funnel Builder Application — [Your Name]



I respond to every complete application within 48 hours.

title: Full-Time YouTube Editor + Shorts Specialist + Growth Strategist
description:
We’re a fast-growing real estate media brand creating YouTube and short-form content focused on helping people make smarter real estate decisions.



We’re looking for a full-time YouTube expert who can:

 • Edit long-form YouTube videos

 • Create high-performing short-form content

 • Support scripting and content ideas

 • Help grow the channel



This is not just an editing job.

We want someone who understands how YouTube works and how to make content perform.



What You’ll Be Doing



YouTube Long-Form Editing

 • Edit 10–20 minute videos with strong pacing and storytelling

 • Add b-roll, graphics, captions, and sound design

 • Improve flow and retention (not just visuals)



Short-Form Content (Custom Content)

 • Edit short videos (usually under 2 minutes) from raw footage

 • Add captions, b-roll, and visual elements

 • Focus on strong hooks and keeping attention

 • Create content for Shorts, Reels, and TikTok



YouTube Growth & Strategy

 • Help come up with video ideas that will perform

 • Assist with titles, hooks, and overall structure

 • Understand retention, CTR, and watch time

 • Bring ideas to improve channel performance



Script & Content Support

 • Help improve scripts, hooks, and video structure

 • Contribute ideas for both long-form and short-form content



Team Support

 • Help edit videos for agents on our team

 • Maintain consistent quality across content

 • Be reliable with communication and deadlines



Who This Is For



You:

 • Have experience editing YouTube videos and short-form content

 • Understand what makes videos perform, not just look good

 • Know how to improve retention, watch time, and engagement

 • Can contribute ideas, not just follow instructions

title: Med Spa Appointment Setter (Female)
description:
We help med spas pack their calendars with lip filler and 
 appointments using
 ads. You will be the first voice our clients’ leads hear. That means you are not “just a caller” – you are the front line of revenue.



We have a lot of fun, but we take our work very seriously. The goal is simple:

Be the best.

Have fun doing it.



We do not hire people to “try sales.” We hire people who want to get very good at it. If that sounds like you, keep reading. 



Schedule: flexible 5 days per week, must be available to help out some weekends, Here are the hours in EST 

Morning shift: 8 am – 3 pm EST

Evening shift: 3 pm – 11 pm EST



What You Will Do:

You will live in two modes all day: Hunting leads and Closing leads



Hunting:

Call new leads within 60 seconds every time you are not already on a call. This is non negotiable. Speed to first contact is the biggest driver of show rates. 

Work all clients’ leads in priority order:

Use GHL, Slack and our internal workflows so no lead is ever left behind.

Run our C.L.O.S.E.R. scripts word for word, naturally.

Clarify their goals, label their problem, understand what they’ve tried, then book them into the right offer.

Handle concerns and reinforce their decision so they actually show.



What Success Looks Like...

You are winning here if:

New leads are called in under 60 seconds 

You rehearse the script so much you can breathe it

You follow up a lot, and you personalize them based on the lead’s goal



Compensation:

Base: $500 USD per month + $1,000 Performance pay for doing minimum daily tasks: + (100% of current setters hit this, it is the standard, not a stretch)

Bonuses:

Monthly performance challenges up to +$500 USD extra

Uncapped +$5 USD bonus  for every low ticket booking you generate

Realistic monthly earnings for a solid performer: $1,500 USD





We pay for results and consistency. If you show up, work the system, and hit your numbers, you will earn well above typical VA roles.

Requirements

Non?negotiables:

Comfortable working EST shifts (either 8 am – 3 pm or 3 pm – 11 pm), 5 days per week including rotating weekends with your teammates.





Strong spoken English with a clear, neutral accent that works for US patients.





Internet at least 100 Mbps up and down, stable power (or a reliable backup).





Quality headset, quiet workspace, large monitor + laptop.





Experience in appointment setting, call center, sales, or high?volume customer support is preferred, but raw coachability and work ethic matter more.





Tools you will use daily: GoHighLevel (GHL), Slack





How We Train You:

You get a full playbook and training system:

Daily script rehearsal, roleplays, and call reviews in week one.

A detailed Appointment Setter Handbook that shows you exactly how to win here.

Ongoing coaching so your skills and income go up over time.





The people who win here:

Show up every day and do the repetitive work.

Take notes, ask questions, and actually fix their mistakes.

Treat this like a career, not a side hustle.





**How To Apply**

Send over a voice recording from 
 talking about:



- Why you think you’d be a fit for this role

- Any relevant experience (preferred, not required)

- A goal want to achieve (can be short or long term)



If I like how it sounds, I’ll respond with the next steps for getting started

title: Jr Data Analyst - 70,000 PHP RETAINER
description:
Spend smart. Scale fast. Build campaigns that convert at every touchpoint.

Department: Performance Marketing

Location: Remote

Hours: 7 days a week, between 9 AM–6 PM Manila time. Flexible hours, max 40 hrs/week, but at least 2 hrs daily. Daily availability is required.

Target Pay: 70,000 PHP per month



ABOUT AJ MEDIA

We run performance marketing for a portfolio of ecommerce brands — and we're scaling fast. We believe the best media buyers aren't made in agencies. They're made by smart, driven people who treat data like a puzzle and refuse to stop until they've cracked it. If you graduated near the top of your class, you love winning, and you want to get paid to think — this role was built for you.



THE OPPORTUNITY

We don't need five years of experience. We need someone who is sharp, competitive, and hungry. You'll be trained directly by senior media buyers managing millions in ad spend across Taboola, Outbrain, and Revcontent. From day one, you'll be in the data — monitoring campaigns, finding patterns, and making decisions that move the numbers. The best performers here grow into Senior Media Buyers fast.



WHAT YOU'LL DO



Monitor daily spend, CPAs, CTRs, and ROAS — proactively flagging trends before they become problems

Launch and optimize native ad campaigns across Taboola, Outbrain, and related platforms

Run A/B tests on creatives, headlines, thumbnails, and landing pages — and draw clear conclusions from the data

Monitor daily/weekly performance reports and dashboards.

Research competitor campaigns and surface new angles and opportunities

Support senior buyers in audience segmentation, budget pacing, and campaign strategy

Stay sharp on native ad trends, platform updates, and industry best practices





WHO YOU ARE

We hire for ceiling, not resume. The ideal candidate is:



A top student — we're talking Dean's List, cum laude, or consistent honors from a leading Philippine university. Academic excellence signals the discipline and analytical rigor we need.

Bachelor’s or advanced degree in a quantitative field such as Statistics, Mathematics, Engineering, Computer Science, or a related discipline

A numbers person — you get excited by spreadsheets, not intimidated by them. You find it satisfying to chase down why a metric moved.

Competitive and driven — you hate losing more than you love winning. You set your own bar higher than anyone else does.

A fast learner with grit — you don't wait for perfect conditions to start. You figure things out, ask smart questions, and never stop at 'good enough.'

Detail-obsessed — you notice when numbers don't add up, and you don't move on until you understand why.

Clear communicator — you can translate complex data into a one-line insight that drives a decision.



Experience in paid media is a plus — not a requirement. We will train the right person from zero.



BONUS POINTS IF YOU HAVE

Hands-on experience with Taboola, Outbrain, MGID, or any paid media platform

Familiarity with tracking tools: Voluum, RedTrack, or similar

Google Analytics or comparable analytics platform experience

Knowledge of advertorial formats and native ad copywriting

Comfortable with pixels, redirects, and basic web infrastructure



WHY JOIN US

Learn directly fro
dia buyers with $MM in ad spend under management

Real performance data from day one — no busywork, no busy-being-busy

Clear, fast path to Senior Media Buyer for top performers

Access to premium tools, industry courses, and training resources

Performance incentives tied directly to campaign results



Sound like you? APPLY HERE:

title: Full time AI video creator
description:
Hiring: AI Content Creation VA (Short-Form Video)



We are a social media content company that creates short-form video content for health and wellness brands on Instagram. We use AI tools to generate images, voiceovers, talking head videos, and motion clips, then edit everything together into finished Instagram Reels.



This is a long-term position, not a one-time project.



What you will be doing:



- Using AI tools to generate realistic images of characters (Nano Banana Pro)

- Generating natural sounding voiceovers (ElevenLabs)

- Creating talking head videos (HeyGen)

- Generating motion video clips (Google Veo 3)

- Editing everything together into polished short-form videos (CapCut or your preferred editing software)

- Using Claude AI to write prompts and improve your work quality



You do not need prior experience with these specific tools. We have a full 9-stage onboarding program that trains you on everything step by step. But you do need to be someone who learns fast and pays attention to detail.



What we are looking for:



- Reliable and consistent. You show up every day and communicate if something comes up. This is the number one thing we care about.

- Detail-oriented. The difference between a good video and a bad one comes down to small details.

- Coachable. You take feedback seriously and apply it to your next video.

- Has their own laptop or desktop computer with a stable internet connection.

- Has their own video editing software (CapCut works great).

- Can follow instructions carefully without needing to be told the same thing twice.



Schedule:



Monday through Saturday. Daily check-in at 9:00 AM PHT. All work for the day must be completed and submitted by 9:00 PM PHT.



Pay:



$500 per month.



Onboarding:



Before you start producing content, you will go through our 9-stage onboarding program. Onboarding is unpaid but mandatory and must be completed within 7 days. This deadline is non-negotiable. It is designed to fully prepare you so you can do the job at a high level from day one. If onboarding is not completed within 7 days we will not be moving forward.



To apply:



Do not just send me a message saying you are interested. To be considered for this position you must complete the following test assignment and include it in your application:




 



Applications without the completed assignment will not be reviewed. This is how we filter for people who actually pay attention and follow instructions.



If you have any questions about the role, include them in your message along with your completed assignment.



Looking forward to hearing from you.

title: People Operations & Training Lead

mbers follow systems correctly

 • system training (Updox, workflows, etc.)

 • role-specific responsibilities

mbers:

4. PAYROLL & ADMIN SUPPORT

 WHAT WE ARE LOOKING FOR



REQUIRED:

 • Experience in operations, HR, or training roles

 • Strong organizational skills

 • Strong written English C1 or C2 only 

 • High attention to detail



VERY IMPORTANT:

 • You must be comfortable holding people accountable

 • You must be proactive — not waiting for instructions



WHAT SUCCESS LOOKS LIKE

title: Excel Systems & Workflow Architect
description:
We are hiring in the Philippines for a high-level Excel and workflow architecture role.



(Assessment included in the posting)



This is not a basic reporting job.

This is not a data entry role.



We are looking for someone who can think at a high level, work inside messy operational files, and build cleaner, stronger systems that improve how the business runs.



The right person must be able to:

 • improve workflows

 • rebuild reports so management can understand issues quickly

 • create cleaner Excel structures

 • identify operational and financial problems through data

 • help move work from the California morning shift into the night shift over time



We do not need someone who only follows instructions.

We need someone who can look at broken or messy reporting, understand what matters, and redesign it into a cleaner, more reliable system.



This role starts with training during California time.



Training Phase:

 • 120 days

 • Monday through Saturday

 • starts at 8:00 AM Pacific Time

 • up to 8 hours per day



During this phase, the person will train directly with the California morning operation.

The purpose is not just to learn tasks.

The purpose is to prove the ability to improve workflows, strengthen reports, and help management get faster visibility into operational problems.



After the training period, the right person will move into the night shift team.



Night Shift Structure:

 • the night shift currently has two people

 • this role is intended to become the third tea
mber

 • the goal is to improve the performance of the night shift

 • the goal is also to gradually pull work away from the morning shift and transfer it into the night shift in a more organized way



Night Shift Schedule start at 16:00 pm PST

 • Sunday through Friday

 • Wednesdays and Sundays off



We are specifically looking for someone who is strong in:

 • Excel

 • workflow design

 • report restructuring

 • operational analysis

 • clean logic

 • reusable systems



A strong candidate will not just prepare reports.

A strong candidate will improve the way reports are built, reduce confusion, increase auditability, and help the company make better decisions faster.



If you are the kind of person who naturally organizes chaos, improves systems, and builds reporting structures that other people can actually use, this role may be a strong fit.



Assessment File



Download the assessment file here:




/spreadsheets/d/1H2UFgxxF1DbBJvoYJFNCnyGY_WsRKqvU/edit?usp=drivesdk&ouid=
&rtpof=true&sd=true



APPLICATION INSTRUCTIONS

 1. Download the assessment file.

 2. Complete the analysis in Excel.

 3. Submit your finished workbook in .xlsx format.



You may organize your work in the structure you believe is most effective, whether in one sheet or multiple sheets.



Submission Requirements

 • Do not delete, overwrite, or modify the original sheets.

 • Preserve all original sheets exactly as provided for audit purposes.

 • Do not convert formulas to values.

 • Keep the workbook fully auditable.

 • Show your logic inside the Excel file itself.


 Submission



Send your completed .xlsx workbook to:





Subject:

Assessment



Submission Rules

 • Attach the Excel file only.

 • Do not include any text in the body of the
.



Only candidates who submit the completed assessment in the required format will be reviewed.

title: Business Development & Partnership Specialist – Private Aviation
description:
About Us



We are a premium private jet brokerage serving high-net-worth individuals and corporate clients across Europe and beyond. We operate in a fast-paced, luxury environment where excellence and discretion are everything.



The Role



We're looking for a sharp, proactive Business Development Specialist to join our team full-time. Your mission: build high-value partnerships, open doors to new clients, and help us scale in the private aviation space.



What You'll Do



– Reach out to luxury concierge services, family offices, wealth managers, travel advisors, premium real estate agencies, yacht brokers, and event organizers to build lasting partnerships

– Craft and send personalized outreach via
 and LinkedIn to secure referral and partnership agreements

– Make confident outbound calls to prospects and partners — phone skills are essential

– Identify and engage potential direct clients (HNWI, CEOs, athletes, public figures)

– Handle inbound inquiries and ensure timely follow-up via phone,
, and WhatsApp

– Keep our CRM and lead tracking up to date

– Scout new opportunities: events, sponsorships, collaborations, and untapped markets



What We're Looking For



– Excellent English, both written and spoken — you'll be communicating directly with luxury brands and high-net-worth clients

– A clear, professional phone presence

– Proven experience in sales, lead generation, or business development

– Background in luxury, hospitality, travel, or aviation is a strong plus

– Skilled in LinkedIn outreach, cold
ing, and cold calling

– Self-driven, detail-oriented, and comfortable working independently

Tools We Use:
, LinkedIn, Google Sheets, WhatsApp, Phone/VoIP



Compensation



$500/month base salary + generous commission on every deal you help close. A single private flight booking can earn you several hundred dollars in commission — and there is no cap on your earnings. The harder you work, the more you make. This is a role where top performers can significantly outearn their base.



Why Join Us?



This is a long-term, full-time role with real growth potential. You'll work at the intersection of luxury and aviation in a small, ambitious team where your efforts directly impact the business — and your income.

title: Part-Time Marketing & Content Role for Small Design Studio
description:
I run a graphic design studio serving small businesses — especially in tech, CPG, and mission-driven organizations. My clients come entirely from word of mouth right now, and I want to change that.

I'm not looking for someone to manage posts. I'm looking for a marketer who can own the strategy and execute the day-to-day — someone who thinks proactively about how to grow a small creative services business, starts with content, and builds from there.



What You'll Own

Content is the starting point, but this role is built to grow into a full marketing partnership. Here's what that looks like:



Content Strategy & Execution

•Develop a content strategy for LinkedIn and Instagram aligned to generating leads and building credibility

•Create content independently — using my portfolio, past work, and context I give you — without needing constant input fro

•Write and format posts, carousels, and captions that sound human and on-brand

•Manage a consistent publishing cadence and track what's working



Marketing Strategy (Where This Grows)

•Proactively bring ideas: new channels, lead gen approaches,
, referral systems — whatever makes sense for a small studio

•Think about the full picture, not just content

•Recommend experiments and share your reasoning



Weekly Collaboration

•One weekly check-in to review what shipped, what's next, and any strategic decisions

•Async updates between calls as needed





What I'll Give You to Work With

I want to be upfront about what you can expect fro
:

•Access to my portfolio and past client work — the raw material for content

•1–2 hours of context per project or content batch — I'll explain the work, the thinking, the story behind it

•Feedback on drafts and direction

•A weekly call to stay aligned



What I won't do: feed you a steady stream of voice memos or raw ideas. You need to be able to generate quality content from a portfolio and occasional conversations — not wait for me to hand you everything.





Who This Role Is For

You're a great fit if you:

•Have real experience marketing a small or service-based business (not just managing social media)

•Can build a content strategy and execute it without being micromanaged

•Write well and can capture a brand voice from examples — AI tools are fine for support, but your writing ability matters

•Are proactive: you bring ideas, flag problems, and move without being pushed

•Understand that for a services business, trust and visibility drive leads — and that content is one of several levers

•Are comfortable with a weekly check-in model and managing your own time between calls



This isn't the right role if you:

•Need constant direction or frequent input to produce work

•Think in terms of posts and engagement metrics only

•Rely on AI to do most of the thinking and writing

•Prefer execution over strategy





Details

•Hours: 10–15 hrs/week to start, can grow to 20+

•Pay: $350–$450/mo USD to start, with growth potential tied to results

•Timezone: Weekly call in my late afternoon / your morning (you manage your own schedule beyond that)

•Platforms to start: LinkedIn, Instagram

•Long-term: scope and pay grow as results build — including other marketing channels





How to Apply

Please answer the following questions. Applications without real answers will not be reviewed.



1.Describe a time you built or owned a content or marketing strategy for a small or service-based business. What did you actually do, and what happened?

2.How do you approach creating content when the business owner isn't giving you much raw material to work with?

3.Share examples of content you've created or strategized — especially for service businesses or creative work.

4.What marketing channels or strategies beyond content would you explore for a small design studio, and why?

5.What tools do you use to manage content strategy and track performance?



Optional but appreciated: A short Loom (2–3 min) walking me through how you'd approach the first 30 days.





This is a long-term role with real growth potential. If you're a marketer who wants ownership and the chance to build something — I'd love to hear from you.

title: SHORT-FORM VFX ARTIST & EDITOR ROLE WITH HIGH EARNING POTENTIAL + BONUSES (Work on Ads Seen by Millions)
description:
SHORT-FORM VFX ARTIST & EDITOR - 

LONG-TERM ROLE WITH PERFORMANCE BONUSES (Work on Content Seen by Millions)



Are you a fast, creative VFX artist who can make scroll-stopping effects look effortless?

We're hiring a skilled short-form VFX artist and editor to join our in-house team at VFX Creators. 



You'll start with a paid trial, and if it's a great fit, this grows into a stable part-time role with real earning potential through performance bonuses.

We teach tens of thousands of creators and entrepreneurs how to make professional VFX content using their phones. Our content reaches millions. We need someone who can bring those effects to life for our marketing, tutorials, and social media pages.



YOUR ROLE



You'll create short-form VFX videos for three main areas: marketing hooks and ads, visual effects content for our social media pages, and tutorial edits that teach our audience how to recreate effects. Output will vary week to week - some weeks more, some less - but as we find our rhythm together, we scale up.



REQUIREMENTS



Must be proficient in Adobe After Effects, Premiere Pro, Photoshop, and CapCut. These are non-negotiable.

Beyond tools, we need someone who works fast under pressure and finds shortcuts without sacrificing quality. We are not looking for perfectionists. We want someone who can move quickly, make decisions, and deliver. You must be organized, detail-oriented, coachable, and 100% fluent in English.



THE TRIAL



Before anything becomes official, we run a paid one-week trial. You will complete four VFX hooks and one tutorial edit. Pay is $200 USD for the week.

Here is the twist: before you start, you will submit time estimates for each deliverable. We will compare those estimates to your actual time. 

This is not a trap. It is how we find people who know themselves, communicate clearly, and can work efficiently under real conditions. 

If you fall behind, we want to know about it before the deadline, not after.



COMPENSATION



Monthly retainer of $600 USD for part-time work (approx. 5hrs/day, with potential to grow into full-time. Performance bonuses on top of base pay: $100 when a full ad hook and body starts scaling, $30 when a new hook enters our testing rotation. If your work performs, you get paid more. Simple.



WHO THIS IS NOT FOR



People who need step-by-step instructions for every task. People who obsess over perfection at the expense of speed. People looking for short-term freelance gigs. People who go quiet when they hit a problem instead of communicating. 



HOW TO APPLY



You must do all three of these or your application will not be reviewed.

Send a short video introduction telling us who you are, what experience you have, and why this role excites you. Include a link to your portfolio or best past VFX work. Use the phrase "Go VFX" somewhere in your application.

We review applications on a rolling basis and will close this once we find the right person. 

Apply now.

title: Strategic Operations & Visibility Manager
description:
Right-Hand Operator | GoHighLevel Expert | CEO Leverage



This is not an assistant role. Read every word before applying.



We are a fast-growing coaching certification company led by Bronwyn Davis — former TV news anchor, 25-year coaching veteran, and founder of the Conscious Ketamine Coaching Academy. We train medical professionals and coaches in a breakthrough methodology that transforms client results.



We are not looking for someone to follow a checklist and wait for direction.



We are looking for a strategic operator — someone who spots what's broken before being asked, builds systems that create 
ntum, and thinks two steps ahead of the CEO at all times. If you need to be managed, this is not your role. If you are the type of person who walks into a business, sees the gaps, and quietly fixes them — keep reading.



One critical note: GoHighLevel is the backbone of everything we are building. We are actively developing a white-label GHL program to sell to our students. Proficiency here is non-negotiable. If you are not advanced in GoHighLevel, please do not apply.



What You Will Own

1. CEO Operations & Executive Support



Own Bronwyn's inbox daily — zero inbox is the standard

Draft responses in her voice before she even thinks to ask

Merge and manage two
 accounts (Gmail + Outlook) into one clean workflow

Mine Fathom AI recordings after every call — extract action items, decisions, and follow-ups

Build and maintain a weekly CEO Dashboard in Asana

Track proposals, invoices, and all follow-ups — zero revenue leaks

Follow up on unpaid invoices professionally and persistently



2. GoHighLevel — This Is Your Domain



Own the CRM fully: pipelines, lead tags, automations

Build and manage follow-up sequences (6–8 touch campaigns)

Build retreat and program interest nurture flows

Connect GoHighLevel with Asana via Zapier

Deliver a weekly sales pipeline report

Contribute to and eventually help execute the white-label GHL student program



3. Business Systems & Operations



Build all project systems from scratch in Asana

Create SOPs as systems are developed — document everything

Deliver a weekly CEO KPI scoreboard: leads, strategy calls, conversions, speaking pitches, newsletter metrics

Identify gaps in the business and propose solutions without waiting to be asked



4. Client Experience



Bi-weekly check-ins with all active clients

Track coaching deliverables, milestone progress, and deadlines

Prepare call recap summaries

Ensure every client feels premium-level care



5. Visibility & Content



Take Fathom/Zoom recordings into Descript for editing and repurposing

Create short-form social clips from long-form video

Draft and schedule weekly newsletters in Flodesk

Manage 3–5 social media posts per week repurposed from podcast, newsletter, and speaking content

Podcast production end-to-end — edit in Descript, write show notes, publish via BuzzSprout, distribute to Spotify, Apple, and YouTube

Research and pitch aligned podcasts for Bronwyn to guest on

Research aligned speaking opportunities and customize pitch templates

Track all outreach and follow-ups





Tools You Must Know



Required from Day One



GoHighLevel (GHL) — advanced; CRM, automations, pipeline builds

Asana — project management (you will build the boards from scratch)

Fathom — AI meeting notes (you will mine recordings for action items)

Google Workspace — Gmail, Calendar, Drive

Descript — podcast editing and content repurposing

BuzzSprout — podcast hosting and distribution

Zoom — recording and collaboration



Nice to Have



Zapier

CapCut

AI tools — ChatGPT, Claude, etc. (comfort required)



You Are the Right Person If...



You have 5+ years supporting coaches, consultants, or speakers at a strategic level

You are advanced in GoHighLevel — you build automations, not just use them

You have built systems from scratch — not just followed someone else's

You have managed or produced a podcast end-to-end

You find gaps in a business and fix them before being asked

Your written and spoken English is excellent — non-negotiable

You work independently and communicate proactively before things become problems

You are comfortable following up on unpaid invoices on behalf of a founder

You can overlap at least 8 hours with Arizona (MST) daily



How to Apply — Read This Carefully



Do not send a generic message. We will not read it.



To be considered, you must answer all five questions in your application message. Short or vague answers will disqualify you immediately.



Start your message with the word STRATEGIC so we know you read this in full.



Question 1

Describe your experience with GoHighLevel specifically. What have you built — automations, pipelines, sequences, integrations? Be detailed and specific. If you have built systems for a coach or service-based business, describe exactly what you built.



Question 2

Walk me through exactly how you would manage an executive's inbox for 3 days with no direction from the founder. What does your process look like from day one?



Question 3

Describe a time you identified a broken process or gap in a business and fixed it without being asked. What was the problem, what did you do, and what was the result?



Question 4

How do you prioritize when everything feels urgent and the CEO is unavailable? Give a real example — not a hypothetical.



Question 5

Are you comfortable following up on unpaid invoices on behalf of a founder? Describe exactly how you would handle a client who has not responded after two reminders.



We read every answer. This is how you get to the next round.

title: Part-Time Bookkeeper | Long-Term Virtual Assistant | UK Property Company
description:
We are hiring 1 reliable Virtual Assistant to support bookkeeping as we rapidly scale our UK property management business. We are building a long-term team, so we are only looking for candidates who are committed and interested in growing with the business.





WHO WE’RE LOOKING FOR:



- This is a long-term opportunity for individuals who want to be valued as part of a growing professional team.

- You must be able to work independently, be self-sufficient, and collaborate effectively with others.

- You must be highly organised, detail-oriented and able to follow structured processes accurately

- You must be proactive in identifying and flagging issues and confident communicating clearly in written English

- You must have hands-on experience in Xero (not just basic use)





KEY RESPONSIBILITIES:



You will be responsible for maintaining accurate financial records and supporting the day-to-day bookkeeping of the business. This includes working with Xero, processing receipts and invoices, reconciling accounts, and preparing data for reporting. You will be supported with clear systems, SOPs and guidance.



Weekly tasks include, but are not limited to:



- Uploading and organising invoices and receipts

- Categorising transactions in Xero

- Reconciling bank accounts

- Matching transactions with supporting documents

- Ensuring all records are accurate and up to date

- Flagging missing receipts, discrepancies or unusual transactions

- Supporting preparation of monthly financial summaries

- Maintaining a clean and organised digital filing system

- Managing stripe transactions

- Strong communication via Slack





WHO ARE WE?



MCPI Hosting is a rapidly growing UK-based property management company specialising in high-quality short-term accommodation for business travellers, contractors and holiday guests across the UK.



- We invest heavily in clear systems and processes so the team can work efficiently and focus on delivering excellent service.

- Our goal is to expand our managed property portfolio, strengthen our presence in existing markets, and grow into new locations.

- We market our properties on major Online Travel Agents (OTAs) such as Airbnb and [
](
).





IDEAL CANDIDATES: 



We are looking for someone who is:



- Proven experience as a bookkeeper or similar role

- Strong working knowledge of Xero including reconciliation (essential)

- Experience with Stripe

- Experience using Google Workspace including Drive and Sheets

- Comfortable using Slack for communication

- Highly organised and detail-oriented

- Calm, professional and confident communicating

- Strong written and verbal English (UK standard)

- Reliable and responsive during working hours

- Comfortable working independently

- Able to follow structured processes precisely

- Tech-savvy and quick to learn new systems

- Proactive and solution-focused



Nice to Haves (Not Essential)



- Experience working with UK-based businesses

- Experience in property or short-term rental businesses

- Familiarity with receipt management tools

- Experience working with GBP (£) preferred





WORKING HOURS



- Approx. 4-6 hours (1 morning) per week (UK time)

- Hours and responsibility will increase over time for the right candidate





TOOLS USED



- Xero

- Hubdoc

- Google Workspace

- Slack

- Clockify





IMPORTANT NOTES:



- This is a long-term position, not a short-term role

- Systems and training will be provided, but experience is required

- You must have a reliable internet connection and working setup





APPLICATION PROCESS



We are running a structured hiring process:



- We will review the first 50 applicants

- All applicants will be asked to complete a short questionnaire

- 5 candidates will be selected for interview

- 1 candidate will be hired





TO APPLY



Include the phrase “MCPI Bookkeeper” in your application so we know you have read this advert fully.



We look forward to receiving your application!

• Strong organizational skills with proven experience in managing deadlines and prioritizing tasks.

• Excellent written and verbal communication skills in English.

• A proactive, independent work ethic with a commitment to excellence.

• Willingness to work California business hours.



Why Join Us?
