We are excited to welcome a talented and experienced lawyer to our team and look forward to hearing from you!

title: Finance Manager: E-commerce & Strategic Growth (£5M to £9M Scale)
description:
About the Role

As our Finance Manager, you will be the "Financial North Star" for Casa Maria Designs. You will work directly with the CEO to protect our £1 million profit goal for 2026. You will take the lead on everything from daily bookkeeping "in the weeds" to high-level strategic forecasting.

This is a 100% exclusive, full-time position. We want you to be a core part of our team, collaborating daily with our Marketing and Operations managers.



Your Key Responsibilities

1. Daily Financial Operations (The Foundation)

• Full-Cycle Bookkeeping: Move us away from "raw data" processing to a real-time internal ledger.

• Daily Reconciliation: Manage and reconcile 500+ monthly transactions across Shopify, Amazon, and our £1.46 million cash balance.  

• Cost Ownership: Track and optimize our £3.07 million Cost of Sales, including global supplier payments and shipping/logistics costs (£638k in 2025).  

• Compliance Liaison: Prepare clean monthly reports for our external UK chartered accountants, Holland & Co..  

• Payroll & Liabilities: Manage payroll and track our £324k+ tax and social security liabilities.  

2. Strategic Growth Analysis (The Future)

• Margin Protection: Provide real-time data to our Marketing Manager to ensure our £849k advertising spend remains highly profitable.  

• Inventory Strategy: Work with our Ops Manager to analyze our £365k inventory and minimize storage fees.  

• Cash Flow Management: Model our cash reserves to ensure we have the liquidity needed for massive inventory scales.

• Dashboarding: Build automated reporting (Excel Macros, BigQuery, or SQL) to give the CEO a daily view of net profitability.

What We Are Looking For

• E-commerce DNA: 2+ years of experience with Shopify, and multi-channel reconciliation.

• Software Expert: High proficiency in Kashflow, Xero or QuickBooks. Knowledge of BigQuery, SQL, or advanced Excel is a major plus.

• Team Player: Someone who wants to be part of a brand, not just a contractor. You should be comfortable challenging our Marketing and Ops leads with data.

• C2 English Mastery: Excellent communication skills are required for this leadership-level role.

• UK Context: Familiarity with UK VAT and Companies Act requirements is essential.



Why Join Casa Maria Designs?

• Direct Impact: You report to the CEO and influence the strategy of a £9 million business.

• Stability: We have a strong cash position and a clear 2026 growth plan.  

• Long-term Growth: We are looking for a partner to stay with us as we scale toward £11M and beyond.





What We Offer:

• Salary: $1,200 – $1,500 per month (based on experience).

• 13th Month Pay: A full month’s bonus at the end of the year.

• Work-Life Balance: You will get all Philippine National Holidays off.

• Stability: A long-term role in a profitable, scaling business with a direct line to the CEO.



How to Apply:

Please send your CV and a brief cover letter explaining why you would be the perfect fit for this role.

title: Sales Virtual Assistant / Appointment Setter
description:
**Important – Read This Job Post Carefully**



We are a fast-growing home service company based in California looking to hire a reliable and motivated Virtual Assistant to help manage incoming leads, customer communication, outbound calls, and appointment scheduling.



Our industry is extremely competitive. Customers often contact multiple companies at the same time, and the company that responds first and communicates most professionally usually wins the job.



Because of this, speed, persistence, and professionalism are extremely important.



Your role will be to contact new leads, communicate with customers, follow up on previous inquiries, and schedule technician appointments.



You will also assist with basic data entry and updating customer information inside our CRM system.



You do not need previous experience with our software, as we will train you on how to use our CRM, call system, and internal tools.



This position is ideal for someone who is comfortable speaking with customers, organized, and able to work in a fast-paced environment.





Please read this job post in its entirety before applying.



This position requires attention to detail and the ability to follow instructions carefully.



Applications that do not follow the instructions outlined in this post will not be reviewed.



ABSOLUTE REQUIREMENTS (READ BEFORE APPLYING)



DO NOT APPLY if you do not meet these requirements.



We will not review applications that do not meet them.



Applicants must have:



• Strong and reliable internet connection (strong WiFi)

• Backup power in case of power outages

• Excellent English speaking ability with minimal accent

• Quiet and dedicated workspace (no background noise)

• Professional quality headset for customer calls



Strongly recommended:



• Dual monitor setup (two screens) to efficiently manage calls and CRM tasks.



Voice Recording Requirement (MANDATORY)



This role requires speaking with customers on the phone throughout the day.



Because of this, all applicants must submit a voice recording reading the script below.



This recording allows us to evaluate:



• English fluency

• Accent clarity

• Professional tone

• Communication ability



Any application submitted without a voice recording will NOT be reviewed or considered.



Please record yourself reading the script below clearly and naturally, as if you are leaving a voi
 for a real customer.



Record in a quiet environment using your headset.



Voice Recording Script



Please read the following message exactly as written:



Hello, this is (insert your name) calling with Professional Garage Door Services.



Our phone number is
, that’s
.



The reason I’m calling is because you recently submitted an inquiry regarding garage door assistance, and we would like to learn a little more about the issue you are experiencing and how we can help.



Our company specializes in garage door repairs, maintenance, and new garage door installations, and our technicians are equipped to handle most issues the same day.



At the 
nt, we actually have a technician working in your area, and because of that we may be able to provide same-day service depending on availability.



What we normally do is send one of our technicians out to perform a quick inspection of the garage door system, identify the issue, and provide you with a free, no-obligation estimate before any work is done.



During the inspection, the technician may also check torsion springs, track alignment, reinforcement struts, roller assemblies, cable tension, opener limits, and the safety sensor system to determine the exact cause of the problem.



The inspection typically only takes a few minutes and it allows our technician to explain exactly what is going on with the door and what options are available for repair or replacement.



If you would like to schedule a visit from one of our technicians, please give us a call at
, and we will be happy to get that arranged for you.



Once again, that phone number is
.



Thank you very much for your time, and we look forward to assisting you. Have a great day.



Scope of Work



Your responsibilities will include:



• Data entry and updating customer information in our CRM

• Placing outbound calls to new leads

• Following up with previous customers

• Scheduling technician appointments

• Sending text messages and
s to customers

• Updating lead notes and tracking communication history

• Coordinating with our internal team



You will be trained on how to use our CRM, dialing systems, and internal tools.



Work Schedule



This position requires working during U.S. daytime hours, which is night shift in the Philippines.



Shifts are 9 hours in length and will fall between the hours of:



7:00 AM – 9:00 PM PST



Exact shifts will be assigned during the hiring process.



Ideal Candidate



The ideal candidate is someone who:



• Is comfortable speaking with customers on the phone

• Has strong communication skills

• Is organized and detail-oriented

• Can follow instructions carefully

• Works well in a fast-paced environment

• Is reliable and punctual



Compensation



The starting rate for this position is $5 per hour.



That said, we actively reward performance—if you show excellent English, strong communication, and the ability to perform effectively in your role, we can increase your pay to $6 per hour.



We’re also building a long-term team, and there will be opportunities to grow into management positions.



If you demonstrate initiative, leadership qualities, and responsibility, you’ll have the chance to move up and take on a larger role within the company..



Tea
mbers who show strong communication skills, reliability, and the ability to consistently perform in this fast-paced environment will be considered for raises over time.



This position is intended to be a long-term role for the right candidate.



Application Instruction



To confirm that you carefully read the entire job description, please start your application with the word:



Technician



*Applications that do not include this word at the beginning will not be reviewed!*

title: Part-time Capcut / TikTok Editor with potential for more
description:
Hiring for part-time work for a Capcut / TikTok editor



You will be making TikTok videos using Capcut. The editing process is fairly simple and straightforward. Anyone who is proficient in video editing should have no problem with the basic tasks, such as:

- Cutting dead space in talking head videos

- Adding overlay images on screen in the videos

- Minor effects such as dynamic zoom, cropping, etc.

- Producing music-only content using quick cuts and engaging edits

- Having the ability to digest what is being said and pair up the overlays with the corresponding footage



Please review a few examples of my content to ensure you are familiar and comfortable with the editing style:



1. Basic talking head - here you are mostly editing dead space and piecing clips together, adding minor effects like crop and zoom to make the frames look more dynamic and seamless.

https://www.tiktok.com/@findzbyhadi/video/7603812644033793294



2. Talking head with overlays - same as before, but adding images provided to you on the screen to support what is being said in the video.

https://www.tiktok.com/@findzbyhadi/video/7617873147550813453



3. Music-only edits - here you are creating fast-paced, engaging edits using quick cuts, transitions, and visual effects to maintain attention without any talking.

https://www.tiktok.com/@findzbyhadi/video/7605395199266721037





You will be working hand in hand with me on an extremely viral social media page and there is room for bonuses if deadlines are met and the content performs well!



Requirements:

- Attention to detail

- STRONG English

- Strong internet connection

- Previous experience with Capcut / TikTok / Instagram

- Good at working with a team

- Must deliver ON TIME!

- Ability to learn and take constructive feedback

- Availability to work 3-4h a day (with potential for more and increased salary)

- Able to work 5-6 days per week (can take days off whenever, as long as you are consistent and videos are being completed)

- Can take payments through Wise

- Communication through 

- PH or similar time zone



$300/month + bonuses for 2-3h a day MAX and potential full-time work in the future with a salary increase.



To apply, please complete the recreate assignment below so I can see your skills (1h max)



Below is a Google drive with the original files you will need to re-create with a reference video:



Google drive:

https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/1xG9IPOT0mFbcPQkrWyjJVv6FO-Cm9LVF?usp=sharing



Reference video: 

https://www.tiktok.com/@mavttdeals/video/7604564900580461854



Please complete the following steps:



- Download the files and import into Capcut

- Cut out all dead space between videos

- Each clip should flow smoothly into the next with minimal to no pause between words

- Using the reference video and context, place overlays in the proper spots

- Pay attention to overlay position and length

- Make them big enough to see/read, but not so big they dominate the screen

- Do not use any transitions, static overlays only

- Message me a link to the re-create video assignment



Please respond back to me beginning with the word “pink”.

title: Part-Time Accountant  (E-Commerce & Service Business)
description:
About Us



We are a growing multi-channel e-commerce company and a service-based agency. Our e-commerce company sells across several online platforms, and our service company has grown rapidly through trusted partnerships and exceptional financial management.

We’re seeking a detail-oriented, proactive accountant to support both businesses in maintaining accurate, timely, and insightful financial records.



Hours

15-20 hours per week (flexible schedule)

Reports to: Company Founder

Remote position



Primary Responsibilities



E-Commerce Accounting 

Sort, categorize, and reconcile transactions in QuickBooks Online from multiple sources (bank, credit card, and PayPal).

Maintain accurate tracking of sales and expenses from four selling platforms (Amazon, eBay, Shopify, and others).

Manage and update a weekly on-hand cash report.

Record and categorize payroll expenses (no payroll processing required).

Track payments to local and international contractors for compliance and reporting.

Assist in monthly reconciliations and financial statement preparation.



Service Business Accounting

Once trained on e-commerce reconciliations, take ownership of agency’s books in QuickBooks Online.

Create and send invoices to clients based on active contracts. 

Monitor accounts receivable and follow up on past-due invoices through professional collections outreach 
 or phone).

Communicate promptly about uncollected invoices or payment discrepancies.

Coordinate with contractors regarding hour tracking and invoice verification.



Skills & Qualifications



3+ years of accounting or bookkeeping experience (QuickBooks Online required).

Experience with PayPal, Wise, e-commerce platforms, and multi-channel data reconciliation.

Strong understanding of chart of accounts, expense categorization, and cash flow tracking.

Excellent organizational and time-management skills.

High attention to detail and accuracy.

Comfortable communicating with both U.S. clients and international contractors.

Proficient in Excel or Google Sheets.





Preferred Experience



Prior work with e-commerce companies or multi-channel sales reporting.

Experience reconciling foreign currency payments.

Knowledge of invoice management and light collections procedures.





Compensation



$7.00–$7.50/hour during the 1–2 month probationary period

$9.00/hour upon successful completion of probation, based on performance

This is a long-term position

Annual performance evaluations to review growth and potential rate increases



Why Join Us

You’ll play a vital role in maintaining financial clarity for two dynamic, growing businesses. This is an opportunity to contribute to a high-impact entrepreneurial environment while enjoying flexible hours and meaningful work that supports global teams.

title: Amazon PPC Expert - Full Time - EST Hours
description:
About the Role



We’re looking for a full-time Amazon Operations Manager to take ownership of our store’s performance and help drive sustainable growth.



This is a hands-on role where you’ll oversee daily operations, optimize listings, and manage PPC campaigns to ensure everything runs smoothly and efficiently.



Key focus areas:



- Amazon PPC management

- Listing quality control and optimization

- Team coordination and oversight



You’ll be responsible for making sure nothing slips through the cracks and that every part of the operation performs at its best.



Your Responsibilities

- Review and optimize all product listings for:

    - Accuracy

    - SEO and conversion optimization

    - Proper formatting and display

- Monitor FBM and FBA inventory, identifying and reporting any issues

- Oversee and guide the Product Lister

- Assign and manage tasks using ClickUp

- Execute and improve Amazon PPC campaigns

- Identify performance gaps, problems, and growth opportunities

- Follow strategic direction from management

- Communicate daily with the team via Slack

- Track work hours using Hubstaff



Requirements

- Proven experience with Amazon Seller Central

- Strong hands-on experience with Amazon PPC

- Extremely detail-oriented with a sharp eye for errors

- Reliable, accountable, and proactive

- Strong English communication skills



You should be comfortable using:



- ClickUp

- Slack

- Hubstaff



Work Schedule

- Full-time position

- 9 AM – 5 PM EST

- Long-term opportunity with growth potential



What We’re Looking For

- We’re not just hiring someone to complete tasks. We want someone who:

    - Takes full ownership of their work

    - Double-checks everything and catches what others miss

    - Thinks critically and solves problems proactively

    - Wants to grow with a fast-moving company



How to Apply

To be considered, include the following in your application:



 - The phrase “AMAZON PRO” at the top

 - Your experience with Amazon Seller Central

 - Your experience managing PPC campaigns

 - A real example of a problem you identified and fixed



Important Note



We are specifically looking for an experienced Amazon PPC specialist and marketing professional with direct, hands-on Amazon experience. General marketing experience alone will not be sufficient - nor will general product listing experience.

title: SENIOR CUSTOMER SUCCESS MANAGER (REMOTE) — TEXAS APARTMENT FINDS
description:
WE DON'T HIRE EMPLOYEES. WE HIRE CLOSERS.



SENIOR CUSTOMER SUCCESS MANAGER (REMOTE) — TEXAS APARTMENT FINDS

???? Open Worldwide | ???? Part-Time to Full-Time | ???? $3–$6/hr USD Base + Up to $2,000/month in Performance Bonuses



IF THIS IS YOU — KEEP READING:

• You check your pipeline before you check anything else

• A cold lead feels personal to you

• You follow up one more time when everyone else has given up

• You do not wait to be told what to do next — you already know

• You are obsessed with closing and you have the receipts to prove it



IF THIS IS NOT YOU — PLEASE DO NOT APPLY:

• You need step by step instructions to function

• You confuse completing tasks with making progress

• You are comfortable with leads going cold

• You are looking for a quiet, low pressure role

• You copy and paste scripts without reading them first



---



ABOUT TEXAS APARTMENT FINDS

We are a fast-growing apartment locating company based in Austin, Texas. We help clients find their perfect apartment for free — the apartments pay us a referral commission every time a client signs a lease. We are on an aggressive path to $50,000 per month in closed leases and we need a closer who is hungry enough to help us get there.



This is a performance culture. Your base pay is just the floor. The real money is in the bonuses. The more leases we close the more you earn. There is no ceiling for the right person.



---



THE ROLE

You are not a customer service rep. You are not an admin. You are a pipeline owner and a closer.



Your one job is to move every single lead from inquiry to signed lease. You will own the pipeline inside GoHighLevel, build curated property lists, book tours, follow up relentlessly, overcome every objection, and push clients across the finish line. You treat every lead like a deal on the table because that is exactly what it is.



Our business runs on closed leases. Closed leases run on you.



---



WHAT YOU WILL DO EVERY SINGLE SHIFT

• Open your pipeline first — identify every lead that needs action and take it immediately

• Send curated property lists to clients based on their budget, timeline, and preferences

• Follow up with every lead from
 Marketplace and social media with urgency

• Book tours and confirm appointments

• Follow up after every tour — overcome objections, answer questions, push to apply

• Chase every application to approved status and every approval to lease signed

• Post 5
 Marketplace listings per shift to drive inbound leads

• Keep your pipeline clean, tagged, and up to date in GHL at all times

• Submit a detailed end of shift report daily— pipeline updates, leads moved, leases closed

• Occasionally jump on a call when a client needs a human touch



---



WHAT WINNING LOOKS LIKE

• 5 closed leases per month minimum — scaling to 25+ as we grow

• Zero leads fall through the cracks on your watch

• Every lead is responded to within the same shift

• Your pipeline tells a story of urgency and 
ntum — not stagnation

• Clients feel taken care of, pushed forward, and confident in their decision

• You are the reason we hit $50,000 per month



---



WHAT WE NEED FROM YOU



Non Negotiable:

• GoHighLevel (GHL) experience OR strong CRM experience in Salesforce, HubSpot, Zoho, Pipedrive, or similar — you must be able to learn GHL fast

• Proven sales, closing, or pipeline management experience — tell us what you closed and how

• Pipeline obsessed mindset — you think in stages, follow up cadence, and conversion rates

• Strong written English — your client communication must be sharp, warm, and professional

• Self directed — you assess, d
, and act without waiting for permission

• Detail oriented — you read everything. You miss nothing.



Strong Green Flags:

• MLS, property management, or real estate platform experience

• Apartment leasing, property management, or real estate sales background

• Experience leading or coaching a sales team

• BPO sales or outbound sales experience

• You have hit or exceeded a quota before and you can prove it



---



SCHEDULE

10AM – 2PM CST or 2PM – 5PM CST Monday through Friday

Part-time to start with a clear path to full-time as volume grows



---



COMPENSATION

• Base: $3–$6/hr USD based on experience

• Performance bonuses: up to $2,000/month based on closed leases and tea
trics

• The more leases we close the more you earn — no ceiling

• Our target is $50,000/month in closed leases — be the reason we get there



---



GROWTH

We promote from within. Closers become Senior CSMs. Senior CSMs build teams under them. If you grow this business you grow with it. Leadership is not a maybe here — it is the expectation for the right person.



---



OUR CULTURE

Less than 7?ceptance rate. High standards. Direct feedback. Radical transparency. We care about our people deeply but we do not apologize for expecting excellence. If you rise to the occasion there is unlimited opportunity here. If you coast there is no place for you here.



We do not micromanage. We do not hand hold. We set the standard and we expect you to meet it.



---



HOW TO APPLY

Incomplete applications will not be reviewed. Send us:



1. Your resume or portfolio

2. A specific example of a pipeline or sales process you owned — what was your role, what did you close, and how did you do it

3. Your CRM experience — tools used and proficiency level

4. Your GHL experience level — none, beginner, intermediate, or advanced

5. Any real estate, MLS, or property management experience

6. Your availability in CST hours and your current timezone

7. Answer this question in three sentences or less: A lead toured an apartment four days ago and has not responded to any follow up. What do you do?



The answer to question 7 tells us everything.



We move fast. Success loves speed — apply now.

title: Experimental Video Editor (Fast Cuts / Raw Style / No “Clean Edits”)
description:
This is NOT a typical video editing job.



We are building a visual style for an underground nightlife brand using:



AI-generated images

short motion clips

fast-cut sequences



We are NOT looking for:



polished edits

smooth transitions

commercial or “pretty” videos



We ARE looking for someone who can:



follow very specific instructions

execute unusual editing styles

work fast and iterate

What You’ll Be Doing:

Editing short-form videos (15–30 seconds)

Working with:

still images (primary)

short motion clips (secondary)

Creating sequences with:

very fast cuts

irregular timing

minimal effects

Style Requirements (IMPORTANT):



Our style is:



raw

imperfect

slightly chaotic

NOT clean or commercial



Think:



underground

experimental

“caught in the 
nt,” not staged



If your instinct is to make things look “nice and smooth,” this is NOT a good fit.



Rules You Must Follow:

NO transitions (no fades, wipes, etc.)

NO text overlays

NO “beautifying” edits

NO overuse of effects

You MUST follow timing instructions exactly



Example:



some images will be shown for only 3–5 frames

others may hold for 0.5–1 second



Precision matters more than creativity.



Tools:



Any of the following is fine:



DaVinci Resolve (preferred)

Premiere Pro

Final Cut

Work Style:

Clear instructions will be provided

You will produce multiple variations (A/B/C versions)

Fast turnaround is important (24–48 hours)

Compensation:

$4–$8/hour depending on skill

Ongoing work if a good fit

Paid test included

APPLICATION INSTRUCTIONS (REQUIRED):



To apply, you MUST do all of the following:



1. Send 2 video samples that feel:



raw

imperfect

NOT polished



(If you send corporate, wedding, or clean social media edits, your application will be ignored.)



2. Answer this question:



If I tell you to show an image for ONLY 3–5 frames, how would you do that in your editing software?



(Be specific.)



3. Confirm:



“I understand this is NOT a polished editing job, and I will follow instructions exactly.”



Final Note:



This role is about precision and execution, not personal style.



If you enjoy experimenting with unusual edits and can follow direction closely, you’ll do very well here.

title: Remote Virtual RCM Assistant – Dental Practice
description:
We are seeking a Remote Virtual Revenue Cycle Management (RCM) Assistant to join our team and help optimize the financial processes of our dental practice. As a key member of our team, you’ll ensure timely payments, minimize claim denials, and streamline billing and insurance processes.



Key Responsibilities:



Insurance Verification: Verify patient insurance details, eligibility, and benefits before treatment to ensure accurate coverage and reduce claim denials.

Coding & Billing: Accurately apply CPT and ICD codes, prepare, submit, and follow up on dental insurance claims.

Claims Management: Monitor claim status, follow up on unpaid claims, and appeal denials with the necessary documentation.

Patient Billing & Collections: Generate invoices, manage co-pays and out-of-pocket expenses, set up payment plans, and communicate with patients regarding balances.

Account Reconciliation: Reconcile patient accounts, track and resolve discrepancies in accounts receivable.

Compliance: Ensure billing and coding practices comply with HIPAA and other healthcare regulations. Stay updated on insurance policies and changes in codes.

Reporting & Analysis: Generate financial reports to monitor revenue, collections, and expenses, analyzing data for improvement opportunities.

Skills & Qualifications:



Knowledge of dental insurance policies and reimbursement processes.

Proficiency with dental billing software (Carestack experience a plus).

Strong communication skills for interaction with patients and insurance providers.

Attention to detail to minimize errors in billing, coding, and claims.

Excellent organizational skills to manage multiple accounts and claims efficiently.

This is a remote, virtual position offering flexible work hours and the opportunity to contribute to the success of a growing dental practice.



If you're ready to make a difference in a dynamic dental environment, apply today!

title: Meta Ads Director
description:
ABOUT GROWTH KEY MARKETING

Growth Key Marketing is a Los Angeles-based digital marketing agency that exists for one reason: to drive measurable revenue for established service-based businesses. We are not a vanity metrics shop. We don’t hide behind impressions and reach. Every dollar our clients invest is tracked, optimized, and tied directly to real business outcomes – leads, booked appointments, and closed revenue.

Our core services include PPC advertising (with a heavy emphasis on Meta Ads), website design, hosting, SMS marketing, and pay-per-lead solutions. We operate as true partners to our clients, not vendors. Transparency, accountability, and data-driven strategy are the pillars of everything we do.

We run lean, move fast, and expect every tea
mber to operate with ownership and urgency. If you need hand-holding, this isn’t the right fit. If you thrive when given autonomy and are energized by high-performance environments, keep reading.

THE ROLE

We are hiring a Meta Ads Director to take full ownership of paid social strategy and execution across our entire client portfolio. This is not a button-pusher role. You will be the strategic engine behind every Meta Ads campaign we run – from initial audit and funnel architecture to daily optimization and scaling.

You will manage 8+ active client accounts simultaneously across a range of service-based industries. You’ll work directly with the Founder and alongside a lean team that values speed, precision, and results above all else. We are looking for someone who sees around corners – someone who doesn’t wait for a campaign to fail before making a move, but proactively identifies optimization opportunities and acts on them before performance dips.

Let us be direct about what matters here: we do not measure success by Cost Per Lead alone. CPL is a data point, not a destination. The only metrics we truly care about are ROI (Return on Investment) and CAC (Customer Acquisition Cost). We need someone who is deeply committed to every campaign on every level – from the top-of-funnel impression all the way down to closed sales and revenue generated. If you’re someone who celebrates a low CPL while the client’s sales pipeline is empty, this is not the role for you. We need someone who tracks the full journey, owns the outcome, and obsesses over the numbers that actually move a business forward.

We are looking for a leader – not someone with a leadership title, but someone with a leadership mindset. The person who fills this role should be able to drop into our system on Day 1 and immediately start making an impact. You should be the type of person who walks into a room, assesses what needs to happen, and starts executing without waiting for a directive. You don’t wait for orders. You don’t wait for a task list. You see the gaps, you identify the opportunities, and you move. You are constantly taking the next step toward success – for every client, every campaign, every day.

This level of commitment means the role does not always fit neatly inside a Monday-through-Friday schedule. Campaigns don’t pause on weekends, and neither should your attention. There will be times when ensuring campaign success requires you to log in on a Saturday or Sunday – whether it’s catching a budget issue, pausing an underperforming ad set, or capitalizing on a scaling opportunity before Monday rolls around. We’re not asking you to work 7 days a week as a rule, but we need someone who cares enough to show up when it matters, regardless of what day it is.

This role is fully remote, based in the Philippines, and requires overlap with U.S. Pacific Time working hours for daily team communication and client-facing needs.



CORE RESPONSIBILITIES

Strategy & Campaign Architecture

• Own the end-to-end Meta Ads strategy for every client account – from initial audit and competitor research through campaign structure, audience architecture, and full-funnel buildout.

• Develop campaign strategies rooted in marketing psychology and buyer awareness levels (Unaware, Problem Aware, Solution Aware, Product Aware, Most Aware). Every targeting decision, ad creative, and funnel step must map to where the prospect sits on the awareness spectrum.

• Architect multi-layered campaign structures that include prospecting, retargeting, and re-engagement sequences with intentional creative and messaging at each stage.

• Design and recommend funnel strategies that align ad traffic with high-converting landing pages, lead magnets, and offer structures – ensuring complete message match from ad to asset.

• Proactively build quarterly and monthly media plans for each client, including budget allocation recommendations, testing roadmaps, and scaling frameworks.

Ad Copy & Creative Direction

• Write high-converting ad copy (primary text, headlines, descriptions) for every campaign – tailored to the target audience’s awareness level, pain points, and decision-making psychology.

• Ensure complete alignment between ad messaging, landing page copy, and the client’s unique value proposition. No disconnects between what the ad promises and what the page delivers.

• Develop creative briefs and provide strategic direction for visual assets (images, carousels, videos) even when working with designers or content creators.

• Continuously test ad copy variations (hooks, CTAs, angles, formats) with a structured A/B and multivariate testing methodology.

• Stay ahead of creative fatigue by proactively rotating and refreshing ad creative on a regular cadence – not reactively after performance has already dropped.

Campaign Management & Proactive Optimization

• Manage day-to-day campaign operations across 8+ client accounts, including budget pacing, bid adjustments, audience refinements, and placement optimization.

• Monitor campaign performance daily with a critical, analytical eye. Identify leading indicators of underperformance (rising CPMs, declining CTRs, frequency creep) and act immediately – before the damage compounds.

• Execute proactive optimizations including audience exclusions, lookalike refreshes, creative swaps, budget reallocations, and campaign structure pivots based on real-time data.

• Maintain rigorous campaign hygiene: proper UTM tagging, naming conventions, pixel/CAPI configuration, conversion event optimization, and attribution tracking.

• Conduct structured weekly and monthly performance audits for every account with documented findings and action items.

Reporting, Analysis & Client Communication

• Build and deliver clear, actionable performance reports that go beyond surface-level metrics. Reports should tell the story of what happened, why it happened, and what’s being done about it.

• Track and report on KPIs that matter: Cost Per Lead (CPL), Cost Per Acquisition (CPA), Return on Ad Spend (ROAS), Lead Quality Scores, Booked Appointment Rates, and Revenue Attribution.

• Prepare data-backed strategic recommendations for clients and present them with confidence during team or client-facing calls when needed.

• Collaborate with the Founder on client communications, providing the data and insights needed to maintain trust and demonstrate ongoing value.

AI Integration & Technology Proficiency

• Leverage AI tools (ChatGPT, Claude, Manus AI, Poppi, and others) as force multipliers in daily workflows – for ad copy generation, audience research, competitive analysis, data interpretation, creative ideation, and reporting automation.

• Stay current with emerging AI capabilities and proactively identify new tools, plugins, and automations that can improve campaign performance or operational efficiency.

• Use AI responsibly and strategically – as a tool to enhance your expertise, not as a replacement for critical thinking and strategic judgment.

Team Collaboration & Leadership

• Work closely with the Founder and broader team (designers, copywriters, web developers) to ensure campaigns are fully integrated across all client touchpoints.

• Provide clear, organized briefs and direction to support tea
mbers involved in asset creation.

• Participate actively in team standups, strategy sessions, and planning meetings. Come prepared with insights, not just updates.

• Take ownership of your domain. Flag risks early, propose solutions independently, and drive outcomes without waiting to be told what to do.

REQUIRED QUALIFICATIONS & EXPERIENCE

• Minimum 4+ years of hands-on Meta Ads 
 & Instagram) management experience with a proven, documented track record of scaling lead generation campaigns for service-based businesses.

• Deep expertise in Meta Business Suite, Ads Manager, Events Manager, Conversions API (CAPI), and Custom/Lookalike Audience architecture.

• Demonstrable understanding of marketing psychology, particularly Eugene Schwartz’s awareness levels (Unaware ? Most Aware) and how they inform targeting, messaging, and creative strategy.

• Strong copywriting ability with a portfolio or examples of high-performing ad copy that drove measurable results in lead generation campaigns.

• Proven experience managing 8+ client accounts simultaneously in an agency environment without sacrificing quality or attention to detail.

• Advanced analytical skills – comfortable with Meta Ads reporting, Google Analytics, UTM tracking, CRM data, and pulling insights from multiple data sources.

• Extensive, hands-on experience using AI tools (ChatGPT, Claude, Manus AI, Poppi, or similar) in professional marketing workflows – not casual use, but integrated daily application.

• Experience working with landing page builders and understanding of conversion rate optimization (CRO) principles to ensure message match between ads and assets.

• Excellent written and verbal English communication skills. You will be writing client-facing copy and participating in team communications daily.

• Reliable high-speed internet connection and a professional remote work setup with backup power/connectivity solutions.

PREFERRED QUALIFICATIONS (NOT REQUIRED, BUT A PLUS)

• Experience with Google Ads, TikTok Ads, or other paid media platforms in addition to Meta.

• Familiarity with CRM platforms (GoHighLevel, HubSpot, Salesforce) and how they integrate with paid media attribution.

• Experience with SMS marketing and multi-channel lead nurture sequences.

• Background working with U.S.-based agencies or clients in service-based industries (legal, medical, home services, financial services, real estate, etc.).

• Meta Blueprint Certification or equivalent.

• Experience with data visualization or reporting tools (Google Data Studio / Looker Studio, Supermetrics, DashThis, or similar).

THE MINDSET WE’RE LOOKING FOR

This is not a role for someone who waits to be told what to do.

We are looking for a self-starter with exceptional energy, initiative, and ownership mentality. Someone who takes the lead, identifies problems before they become emergencies, and drives solutions without needing constant oversight.

You should be comfortable operating in a high-pressure, fast-paced agency environment where priorities shift, deadlines are tight, and clients expect results – not excuses. You will be managing real budgets for real businesses, and the margin for carelessness is zero.

We believe in radical transparency: if something isn’t working, we say it. If a campaign is underperforming, we own it and fix it. We expect the same from you.

We will know within the first 30 days whether you are a leader or someone who needs to be managed. We are hiring for the former.

HOW TO APPLY

If this role sounds like it was written for you, we want to hear from you. To apply, please submit the following:

• Your updated resume/CV highlighting relevant Meta Ads and agency experience.

• A portfolio or case study deck showcasing 2–3 lead generation campaigns you managed for service-based businesses – include strategy, execution, and measurable results (Cost Per Client Aquisition & ROI), we don't care about vanity metrics like (CPL, ROAS, Impressions, Clicks, etc.). 

• A brief Loom video (3–5 minutes) introducing yourself, walking us through one campaign you’re proud of, and explaining why you’re the right fit for this role.

• Examples of ad copy you’ve written that drove strong results.

• A short description of how you currently use AI tools in your marketing workflow.



Applications without a Loom video and portfolio/case studies will not be considered.

We review every application personally. If you’re the right fit, you’ll hear from us.

• Run scenario/sensitivity analyses for pricing, hiring, capex, and capital allocation.

• Business Valuation Familiarity



Lead Exit-Readiness & M&A Support

• Prepare diligence-ready financials: EBITDA bridges, normalization adjustments, and working capital analyses.

• Assemble and maintain data rooms; create CIM/board-ready exhibits and KPI schedules.



Own Monthly Reporting & Board Materials

• Produce accrual-basis P&L, BS, CF with variance analysis and actionable commentary.

• Build concise “board style” decks in PowerPoint with trends, bridges, and forward views.

• Deliver flash reports for founders and investors.



Instrument & Analyze KPIs

• Define the metric architecture (definitions, calculations, owners, cadence).

• Build Excel-based dashboards for LTV/CAC, payback, retention/cohort analysis, product/channel margins, unit economics.

• Translate operational data (e-commerce, SaaS, marketplace, services) into financial impact.



Please Note: M&A experience (FDD/Transaction advisory, investment banking or other M&A experience is required).



Book keeping and full cycle accounting experience as well as Quickbooks familiarity is a strong plus.



This role will be full time and the expectation is that the role is your primary focus with no contracting/other roles done on the side.

Please do not apply if this profile does not suite your experience or desired work arrangement.



Qualifications:

Bachelor's degree in Accounting or Finance; Master’s degree or MBA preferred.

CPA certification is required.

At least 5 years of M&A and FP&A related experience

Audit experience, bookkeeping, full cycle accounting and Quickbooks experience is also preferred

Experience with accounting software (e.g., QuickBooks, NetSuite, Wave).

Experience as an FP&A analyst or manager and familiarity working with financial models and forward-looking projections

C1 level or higher proficiency in English.

Strong analytical, problem-solving, and organizational skills.

Excellent communication skills, both written and verbal.

A strong sense of ethics, confidentiality, and professionalism.

Ability to work independently, prioritize effectively, and meet deadlines.

title: Short-Form Video Editor (Premiere + After Effects)
description:
ZEW Media is a growing Chicago-based content agency producing high-volume short-form content for brands, real estate teams, and founders.



We’re looking for a skilled video editor who is:



• Fast and detail-oriented

• Strong with short-form pacing and retention

• Clean with captions and typography

• Proficient in Adobe Premiere Pro

• Comfortable in After Effects for subtle motion graphics

• Reliable with consistent weekly output



This role is primarily focused on short-form social content (Reels, TikTok, YouTube Shorts), with occasional higher-end creative or long-form projects.



We are not looking for heavy transition edits or trend-based template styles. We value clean pacing, strong hooks, clarity, and subtle, professional motion design.



Responsibilities



• Edit short-form social content (30–90 seconds)

• Add clean captions and subtle motion graphics

• Repurpose long-form content into short clips

• Implement revision notes efficiently

• Maintain organized project files



Occasionally:

Requirements



• Strong proficiency in Adobe Premiere Pro

• Solid working knowledge of After Effects (text animation, lower thirds, light motion graphics)

• Basic to intermediate Photoshop skills (thumbnails, end cards, simple graphic assets)

• Understanding of retention-focused editing

• Organized workflow and file management

• Clear communication and consistent availability



Compensation



Part-time monthly contract

$1,000 – $1,500 per month (based on experience and speed)

title: Virtual Assistant- Dental Billing
description:
Job Overview:

We are seeking a detail-oriented and highly organized Dental Biller to join our Oral Surgery team. The ideal candidate will have hands-on experience with oral surgery billing, insurance claims processing, accounts receivable (AR), and aging reports. Experience with surgical procedures, pre-authorizations, and medical cross-coding is highly preferred.



In this role, you will work closely with our clinical team, patients, and insurance providers to ensure accurate and timely billing, maximize reimbursements, and support effective collections. This position plays a critical role in maintaining the financial health of our oral surgery practice while ensuring patients have a clear understanding of their financial responsibilities.



Key Responsibilities:



Accurately process and submit dental and medical insurance claims for oral surgery procedures

Handle pre-authorizations and insurance verifications for surgical treatments

Follow up on outstanding claims, delayed payments, and aging accounts (AR)

Post payments from insurance companies and patients to appropriate accounts

Review and resolve claim denials, rejections, and underpayments, including appeals when necessary

Cross-code between CDT and CPT codes when applicable for medical billing

Maintain up-to-date knowledge of oral surgery billing procedures, coding, and insurance guidelines

Ensure compliance with HIPAA regulations and office policies

Collaborate with front office and clinical teams to ensure accurate documentation and billing workflows

Communicate clearly with patients regarding treatment estimates, insurance coverage, and balances



Qualifications:



Experience: Minimum of 2+ years in dental billing; oral surgery or specialty billing experience strongly preferred

Strong knowledge of CDT and CPT coding, including medical billing for dental procedures

Experience with insurance portals, claim submission, AR follow-up, and aging reports

Proficiency in dental software (e.g., Dentrix, Eaglesoft, or similar systems)

Familiarity with pre-authorizations and surgical case billing

Excellent attention to detail and organizational skills

Ability to manage multiple accounts and meet deadlines in a fast-paced environment

Strong communication skills (verbal and written)

Ability to work independently and collaboratively within a team



How to Apply:

Please complete the virtual interview at:

app.xinterview.ai/direct_invite/816ceba8-466a-4f9e-a792-a0b693107f7d



We will follow up with qualified candidates after reviewing applications.

title: The GREATEST Customer Service and Sales Representative
description:
Customer Service Representative

Join the My Pest Pros Team!

Located in Vienna, Virginia

Tuesday-Friday schedule: 8am-5pm EST (with hour break during day)

Saturday: 9am-5pm EST



**If you are interested, please include your resume and share a Loom or other recording of you talking about your experiences.



**Must have strong English and have worked for companies in the U.S. Experience in sales and working in a fast-paced environment are a plus! Experience with home services is a plus.



***When applying, use 8 Apply Points!



Are you passionate about helping people and providing exceptional customer service? My Pest Pros is seeking motivated, detail-oriented customer service representatives with experience in phone support and scheduling. In this role, you’ll handle inbound calls, schedule, respond to
s and texts, and sell pest control services to new and existing clients. Ideal candidates will be personable, goal-driven, and comfortable in a fast-paced environment. Experience in home services, CRM platforms (like PestPac), and service-based sales is a plus.



At My Pest Pros, we’re more than just a pest control company—we’re a family-owned business with a mission to create positive change for our employees, clients, and community. We value integrity, communication, accountability, respect, and empathy (I-CARE). Join our family-focused team where you can grow professionally, earn commissions, and make a real impact every day. If you're ready to be part of something meaningful and dynamic, apply today!

title: Phone Customer Service Representative
description:
We are seeking a highly motivated, professional, and personable Phone Customer Service Representative to join our team. The ideal candidate has excellent spoken English, a neutral or American/British accent, and strong communication skills. This role is primarily focused on speaking with customers and partners over the phone, providing support, handling inquiries, coordinating with vendors, and helping ensure a smooth customer experience. The right person should be organized, adaptable, calm under pressure, and comfortable managing multiple tasks in a fast-paced environment.



Key Responsibilities:



- Answer inbound and make outbound calls to customers, vendors, and partners.

- Provide a high level of customer service and maintain a professional, friendly tone on every call.

- Assist customers with questions, updates, and issue resolution.

- Coordinate with vendors, partners, and internal tea
mbers to help move orders and requests forward.

- Build and maintain strong relationships with customers and partners.

- Accurately enter data and maintain records in internal systems.

- Conduct online research when needed to gather relevant information.

- Handle multiple ongoing tasks efficiently while staying organized and detail-oriented.

- Work closely with the team to ensure smooth day-to-day operations.



Qualifications:



-Previous experience in a BPO, call center, or phone-based customer service role is required.

-Excellent verbal communication skills with a neutral or American/British English accent.

-Strong interpersonal skills and the ability to build rapport quickly over the phone.

-Confident, clear, and professional speaking style.

-Strong organizational skills and attention to detail.

-Ability to multitask and prioritize effectively in a fast-paced environment.

-Self-motivated, proactive, and able to work independently.

-Reliable internet connection and a quiet work environment.



Work Schedule:



Full-time, US Eastern Time hours

Exact schedule to be discussed.



Application Instructions:



To apply, please record a short video of yourself answering the following questions. Please do your best using a clear US accent:



1. How many clients do you currently have, and how many hours per week do you work with them?

2. We’re looking for someone to work US hours. Does that work for you?

3. What interested you in this position, and what are you looking for in your next opportunity?

4. Do you consider yourself an entrepreneur? Why? If yes, please give an example.

5. Do you consider yourself a risk taker? Why? If yes, please explain.

6. Do you consider yourself hardworking? If yes, please share an example that shows your work ethic.

7. What motivates you most in life, and why?

8. Which do you value more: money or growth? Why?

9. Describe one of your favorite clients/jobs. Why were they your favorite?

10. What is one of the biggest challenges you’ve overcome in your life?

11. Is there anything else you think we should know about you?



Please note: applications without the video described above will not be considered.



We look forward to hearing from you.

, phone, and messaging

title: Help us conquer the German Amazon Market as a PPC Manager
description:
We’re a Dutch team in the Kitchen & Home Improvement niche. We have a catalog of 200+ products, but we’re only halfway there on Amazon. We are currently switching everything to FBA, and we need a PPC heavy-hitter to help us navigate this boost.



We aren't looking for a one-off freelancer. We want a long-term partner who grows with us. The plan is simple: start by making the first batch of products highly profitable, prove the strategy works, and then scale the rest of the catalog together.



You have 5+ years of PPC experience and you’ve "been there, done that" when it comes to scaling accounts. You understand the German (DE) market and you know how to act as an Account Owner, not just a button-pusher.



A few questions to keep it human:

Scaling: What’s the biggest account you’ve personally owned? What did it look like when you started, and where did you take it?



The Team Sync: We have a Catalog Manager. How often do you think you’d need to sync up with them to ensure our PPC and inventory are perfectly aligned? What’s your "sweet spot" for meetings to get the best results?



What is one specific thing about the German Amazon customer that most people get wrong?



Show us the receipts:

Please send over a case study. We want to know the actual steps you took to scale. Did you build that strategy from scratch yourself, or were you part of a team executing someone else’s plan?

title: Operations Admin
description:
We're Shore Way Management a short-term rental company managing high-performing homes in Massachusetts. Our guests expect 5-star stays. Our owners expect tight operations, fast responses, and no loose ends.



That’s where you come in.



We’re hiring an Operations Admin VA to help us behind the scenes. Damage claims, cleaner invoices, refund tracking, guest chargebacks — all the little fires that pop up after checkout. We need someone who can stay organized, follow through, and keep things moving even when the rest of the team is offline.



What You’ll Be Doing:



• Send a short daily update in Slack (what you finished, what’s pending)

• File insurance damage claims with proper documentation

• Fill in light guest or messaging support as needed messages via HostBuddy, Airbnb, VRBO, and Slack threads

• Escalate maintenance or access issues using internal SOPs

• Track vendor invoices and flag missing ones

• Help log maintenance receipts and guest refunds

• Flag urgent or unusual cases for internal review and documentation

• Coordinate refunds, chargebacks, and expense tracking with our bookkeeper

• Follow up with cleaners, vendors, and field staff to confirm resolution and updates



This is a detail-heavy role. If you like checklists, folders, and clear finish lines, you’ll do great here.



A Bit About You:



• You’re organized, dependable, and don’t need to be micromanaged

• You write clearly and double-check your work

• You’ve done some kind of STR, admin, or bookkeeping support before

• You’re comfortable using Spreadsheets, Slack, and maybe a PMS like Hospitable and Mews



The Job:



• Full-time, 9 hour per day, 5 days per week

• Shift: 4PM-1AM EST

• Starting pay is $3.50 USD/hour with 90 day retention bonus and scheduled hourly raises

• 13th month pay is included

• First raise after 6 months, second after 12 months based on performance

• One full week of training (Monday through Friday) before you begin your regular shift

• After training, your shift will rotate every 90 days to support team needs



How to Apply:



 us at 
 with the subject line “I want to be an ops assistant” Include a link to your OnlineJobs.ph profile in the
. We’ll reply with a Google Form. Fill it out completely. One of the questions will ask your age - to show you're paying attention, answer "40". Only complete applications will be reviewed.



We’re excited to find someone who wants to grow with us and help keep the backend of this business running smooth.

title: Executive Virtual Assistant - Real Estate & Hospitality Industry
description:
Job Summary



We are seeking a highly organized, proactive, and discreet Executive Virtual Assistant to provide high-level administrative and operational support to senior leadership within the Real Estate and Hospitality industries. This role requires exceptional attention to detail, strong communication skills, and the ability to manage multiple priorities in a fast-paced, remote, and often startup-driven environment.



The ideal candidate has proven experience supporting C-level executives in real estate, property management, hospitality, or leasing businesses, is comfortable working across different time zones, and can operate independently with minimal supervision while maintaining strict confidentiality.



Key Responsibilities

• Manage complex executive calendars, scheduling meetings across multiple time zones

• Coordinate and organize virtual meetings (Zoom, Microsoft Teams, Google Meet), including agenda preparation and minutes documentation

• Screen, prioritize, and respond to
s and communications on behalf of executives

• Prepare reports, presentations, and executive-level correspondence

• Assist with property listings, leasing coordination, and tenant communications

• Support day-to-day operations of real estate and hospitality portfolios (e.g., short-term rentals, hotels, serviced apartments)

• Manage and update real estate CRM systems

• Provide administrative support in startup environments, including process improvement and documentation

• Assist in managing and maintaining leasing platforms and property management tools

• Maintain confidential records, documents, and executive files



Qualifications

• 1 - 2 years experience as an Executive Assistant or Executive Virtual Assistant

• Proven experience supporting C-level or senior executives

• Required experience in Real Estate and/or Hospitality industries

• Real estate CRM systems (e.g., Salesforce, HubSpot, or similar)

• Leasing platforms and property management tools

• Experience working in startup or fast-growing environments is highly preferred

• Exceptional written and verbal communication skills

• Excellent organizational, multitasking, and problem-solving abilities

• Ability to work independently with minimal supervision with high level of discretion and professionalism

• Comfortable working across different time zones



How to Apply? Send us the link of your updated resume. 

KINDLY MAKE SURE THAT THE LINK IS ACCESSIBLE.

1. How many years of experience do you have as an Executive Virtual Assistant in the Real Estate and/or Hospitality Industry?

2. What Leasing platforms, property management tools, and/or CRM Tools commonly used in the Real Estate and/or Hospitality Industry are you familiar with?

 Ability to handle multiple tasks simultaneously and meet deadlines.

dia buying and client strategy, to agency internal operations.

title: Affiliate Marketer Setup/Management
description:
Experienced Affiliate Marketing Specialist – Set Up Full Program + Recruiter Sourcing (Long-term)



Job Description:

We are looking for a skilled and reliable Affiliate Marketing Virtual Assistant / Specialist with at least 5 years of hands-on experience in setting up and managing affiliate programs from scratch.

This is a long-term position for someone who can build the complete foundation of our affiliate program and then help scale it by finding and onboarding quality affiliates.

Key Responsibilities:

 • Research and recommend the best modern affiliate tracking platform in 2026 (must handle advanced tracking technologies, e-commerce site integration, server-to-server tracking, and solutions for App Tracking Transparency / ATT / privacy changes).

 • Fully set up the chosen tracking platform on our e-commerce website (including proper installation, configuration, pixel/setup, commission structures, reporting dashboards, fraud prevention, etc.).

 • Create all necessary program materials (terms & conditions, commission rules, promotional assets guidelines, etc.).

 • Develop a strategy for recruiting affiliates.

 • Actively help source and recruit affiliates from social media platforms (Instagram, TikTok,
 groups, YouTube, forums, etc.).

 • Build and maintain a database of potential affiliates and outreach templates.

 • Monitor initial performance, optimize tracking accuracy, and provide regular reports.

Requirements:

 • Minimum 5 years proven experience in affiliate marketing — specifically setting up tracking platforms and programs from scratch (not just promoting as an affiliate).

 • Strong knowledge of top-tier tracking tools used today (examples: Post Affiliate Pro, Tapfiliate, Impact, Everflow, Refersion, PartnerStack, or similar modern platforms).

 • Experience integrating tracking with e-commerce websites (Shopify, WooCommerce, or custom platforms).

 • Familiarity with privacy-compliant tracking methods (first-party cookies, server-side tracking, mitigating ATT issues, etc.).

 • Ability to research, recommend, and implement the most effective solution for long-term performance.

 • Excellent English communication skills (written and spoken).

 • Proactive, detail-oriented, and able to work independently with minimal supervision.

 • Bonus: Experience recruiting affiliates via social media outreach or managing recruiter teams.

What We Offer:

 • Long-term, stable position with potential for growth as the program scales.

 • Competitive hourly rate based on experience (please include your expected rate in your application).

 • Flexible hours (we respect Philippine time but are open to overlap with US time when needed).

 • Opportunity to be the key person building and growing our affiliate channel.

If you have real experience building affiliate programs (not just basic promotion), please apply with:

 1 A short introduction about yourself.

 2 Your exact years of affiliate marketing experience.

 3 Which tracking platforms you have set up before.

 4 A brief example of a similar project you’ve handled.

 5 Your expected hourly rate in USD.

We review applications carefully and will only contact serious candidates with matching experience.

Looking forward to hearing from talented affiliate specialists!

title: Senior Design Associate (PH)
description:
Join our fast-growing architectural and design firm in the vibrant city of San Jose, backed by AlphaX RE Capital. Specializing in single-family homes, ADUs, SB9 projects, multi-family dwellings, and light industrial developments, our team is dedicated to innovation and excellence. With a full range of real estate services—from land acquisition to project execution—Alignment Architects Inc. offers a unique opportunity for growth and collaboration across disciplines



We at Alignment Architects Inc. are seeking an experienced and detail-oriented Senior Design Associate to join our architectural and design firm. In this role, you will take a leadership position in the design department, overseeing drafting, coordinating workflows, mentoring junior staff, and ensuring timely delivery of high-quality architectural projects. This position is essential in driving design excellence, maintaining compliance, and supporting the team in meeting deadlines across residential and commercial developments in California.

.

Responsibilities 

• Lead the preparation of detailed construction documents using Revit (required) and CAD for California projects. 

• Ensure accurate integration of MEP, Structural, and Civil Engineering plans into architectural design. 

• Oversee project coordination with Design Leads, Engineers, and consultants, ensuring seamless workflow. 

• Implement rigorous quality control processes to ensure compliance with California Building Codes and City/County Zoning laws. 

• Manage project documentation, including schedules, coordination records, and technical reports. 

• Represent the design team in client meetings, presentations, and reviews, incorporating feedback into deliverables. 

• Prepare and manage complete submission packages for Building Permits across multiple jurisdictions. 

• Mentor junior associates, providing guidance on drafting standards, compliance, and project workflows. 

• Contribute to workflow optimization and process improvements within the design department.



Qualifications 

• Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Architecture. 

• 5–10 years minimum drafting experience in the Architecture/Construction industry. Previous US project experience strongly preferred. 

• Revit proficiency is required. Knowledge of AutoCAD, SketchUp, and Bluebeam is a plus. 

• Strong leadership and mentoring skills, with proven ability to manage project workflows. 

• Excellent communication and presentation skills in English. 

• Strong organizational skills, high attention to detail, and accuracy in documentation. 

• Ability to work independently and manage multiple projects in a fast-paced environment. 

• Knowledge of industry-specific standards and California compliance requirements.



Fully Remote 

Schedule: 10:00 am – 6:00 pm PST Monday–Friday (1:00 am – 9:00 am PH Time)

title: Motion Graphics Video Editor

title: Clinician Support
description:
About the job



Clinician Support VA serves as a crucial liaison between healthcare clinicians and pharmacies, ensuring seamless communication and resolution of concerns related to patient treatment plans. This position primarily addresses inquiries or issues regarding clinicians’ prescribed treatments, offering timely assistance to clarify and facilitate proper implementation. Additionally, the role involves providing pharmacies with the necessary information and support to ensure accurate dispensing and adherence to the prescribed regimen, assisting clinicians as necessary for the treatment of patients, including appointment rescheduling. By maintaining clear communication and efficient problem-solving, the Clinician Support Team enhances the overall coordination of care for patients.





Responsibilities



Towards the Clinicians: These VAs help healthcare clinicians by streamlining administrative tasks, improving communication, and ensuring a smoother patient care process.

- Scheduling and managing appointments for clinicians.

- Coordinating clinicians' calendars to minimize scheduling conflicts.

- Confirming clinicians’ in-person schedule.

- Handling
 and communication with patients, pharmacies, and clinicians.

- Assisting patients with insurance queries or eligibility checks and endorsing it to the dedicated team for processing.

- Troubleshooting minor technical issues related to telehealth platforms and patient portals.

- Addressing clinicians requests and collaborating with the concerned team(s).



Towards the pharmacies: These VAs focus on supporting pharmacy operations, assisting pharmacists, and ensuring patients receive their medications promptly and correctly.

- Manage prescription refill requests, cancellations, and approvals.

- Verifying prescription details with clinicians when needed.

- Coordinate with the insurance team for prior authorization fulfillment.

- Managing communication between the pharmacy, clinicians, and patients.





Qualifications



- Good communication and organizational skills.

- Familiarity with healthcare or pharmacy software (e.g., EMRs, telehealth tools, or pharmacy management platforms).

- Knowledge of HIPAA regulations and confidentiality protocols.

- Comfortable speaking with medical staff

- Good problem-solving skills

- Attention to detail for managing sensitive patient information and compliance requirements

- With Medical Background preferred

title: Video Creator & Editor (Music Artist – Short Form Content)
description:
About Us

We are a fast-moving creative team building visual content for a growing music artist. Our focus is on producing engaging, visually striking short-form videos that amplify the artist’s sound, aesthetic, and brand presence across social platforms.

We prioritize originality, strong visual identity, and content that feels native to TikTok, Instagram Reels, and YouTube Shorts.



Role Overview

You will create short-form videos designed to elevate the artist’s music and grow audience engagement. This includes beat-synced edits, visually compelling performance cuts, stylized lyric videos, aesthetic-driven visuals, and trend-adapted short-form formats.

You must understand how to hook attention within the first 1–3 seconds and maintain visual energy through strong pacing, transitions, and sound alignment.



Responsibilities

Create short-form music videos (15–60 seconds)

Edit engaging, beat-synced, visually dynamic content

Develop creative visual looks aligned with the artist’s brand

Produce performance-style edits, aesthetic reels, and stylized lyric clips

Integrate current social trends while maintaining artistic identity

Use AI tools when appropriate to generate visuals, effects, or stylized elements

Deliver multiple variations for testing (different hooks, cuts, captions)

Maintain clean, polished on-screen text with correct English



Required Skills

Strong video editing skills

Excellent sense of rhythm and beat synchronization

Ability to create visually interesting, aesthetic-driven edits

Understanding of short-form attention mechanics

Strong English for captions and on-screen text

Resourceful and able to work independently

Ability to execute creative briefs efficiently



Preferred Skills

Experience with CapCut

Experience with AI video tools (Runway, Pika, Midjourney, etc.)

Experience editing music content or artist pages

Background in visual storytelling for musicians

Strong understanding of TikTok and Reels editing styles

Performance & Pay

$2 per approved short-form video

Payment based on approved deliverables

High performers may receive extended contracts or full-time opportunities



How to Apply

Send the following:

Video portfolio (required – direct links only)

Examples of music-focused or beat-synced edits

List of tools you use (especially AI tools and CapCut experience)

Weekly availability



Applications without a video portfolio will not be considered. Only applicants with strong editing skills and demonstrated creative ability will be reviewed.

title: Long-Form Technical Video Creator
description:
Company: Nebula



Type: Full-time, Remote



Start Date: Immediate

About Nebula

Nebula is an AI-powered agent platform that helps people automate their work. We're growing fast and need a dedicated video creator to own our YouTube channel and produce high-quality, technical long-form content.



The Role

You'll be the primary creator behind our YouTube presence — scripting, filming/screen-recording, editing, and publishing 2-3 long-form videos per week. Content ranges from product tutorials and AI tool walkthroughs to developer-focused explainers and demo videos.

This is NOT a generic editing role. You need to understand the AI/tech space well enough to create content that resonates with developers, founders, and power users.



What You'll Do

Script and storyboard 2-3 long-form YouTube videos per week (8-20 min each)

Record screen captures, voiceovers, and/or talking-head segments

Edit with motion graphics, annotations, and clean pacing

Optimize titles, thumbnails, descriptions, and tags for YouTube SEO

Analyze video performance and iterate on what works

Collaborate with the founding team on content strategy



Requirements

Portfolio required — share 3-5 YouTube videos you've created (tech/AI content strongly preferred)

Proficiency in video editing software (Premiere Pro, DaVinci Resolve, or Final Cut Pro)

Strong screen recording and tutorial production skills

Comfortable with AI/tech terminology and concepts

Excellent English (written and spoken) — scripts must be clear and engaging

Ability to work independently and hit deadlines in a fast-paced startup

Reliable internet and a quiet recording environment



Nice to Have

Experience with motion graphics (After Effects)

Thumbnail design skills (Photoshop/Figma)

Familiarity with YouTube Analytics and SEO tools (TubeBuddy, vidIQ)

Personal YouTube channel with tech content

Experience with AI tools (ChatGPT, Claude, Cursor, etc.)



How to Apply

Subject line: "Video Creator Application - [Your Name]"

Portfolio: Links to 3-5 videos you've created (YouTube preferred)

Brief intro: Who you are, where you're based, and why this role excites you

Availability: When you can start and your typical working hours (include timezone)

Sample task: Record a 2-minute screen capture explaining what Nebula does (visit nebula.gg) — this is your audition



Applications without a portfolio will not be reviewed.

title: Customer Service Representative
description:
We are looking for an experienced Customer Service Representative to join our team who has GREAT ENGLISH SPEAKING SKILLS (minimal to no accent) and can start immediately.

You will answer the phone pleasantly and with a smile. We will train you how to answer questions. You will take detailed call summary notes which will include contact information and any other relevant information.



You should be comfortable on the phone and have a strong grasp of American English. Must have excellent comprehension and the ability to converse in English effortlessly.
