Starting rate is $3 on the 1st month, $4 on the 2nd month and $5 on the 3rd month.



SCHEDULE:

Monday-Fridays & Sunday

Saturday- (clock in only if needed)



We are willing to train the right candidate who is motivated, hard-working, and eager to add value to our company.

title: Project Manager
description:
**VIDEO PRODUCTION PROJECT MANAGER**

Position Description & Performance Framework



---



**MISSION**



To drive client satisfaction and revenue retention by orchestrating seamless video production workflows that deliver high-quality content on time and within scope, ensuring every project exceeds client expectations while maximizing team efficiency and output quality.



---



**OUTCOMES & KPIs**



**1. 100% On-Time Delivery · 95% Client Satisfaction Rate**

a. Coordinate and schedule filming sessions within 48 hours of project kickoff

b. Ensure all filming crew and videographers are briefed and equipped with detailed scripts and creative direction before each shoot

c. Complete footage review and AI-assisted clip organization within 24 hours of filming completion

d. Deliver final edited content to clients within agreed timeline (typically 5–7 business days from filming)

e. Achieve first-draft approval rate of 80% or higher, minimizing revision cycles



**2. Efficient Team Coordination & Quality Control**

a. Maintain relationships with 3–5 reliable filming crews/videographers for consistent availability

b. Create comprehensive creative briefs for editors that result in 90?herence to brand guidelines

c. Monitor editor performance metrics including turnaround time and revision requests

d. Establish quality checkpoints at footage review, first edit, and final delivery stages

e. Coordinate with social media team for Instagram and LinkedIn posting within 24 hours of client approval



**3. Revenue Protection Through Client Retention & Project Expansion**

a. Maintain client retention rate of 90% or higher through exceptional project management

b. Identify and propose additional video formats or content opportunities during project execution

c. Document and share client feedback to improve future project outcomes

d. Ensure all deliverables meet or exceed contracted specifications



**4. Daily Administrative & Team Coordination**

a. Daily check-ins with active filming crews and editors via Slack or project management tools

b. Weekly project status reports to leadership team

c. Maintain updated project timelines and deliverable tracking in CRM/project management system

d. End-of-day project status updates and next-day preparation



---



**COMPETENCIES**



- **Project Management Excellence** — Juggle multiple projects simultaneously while maintaining attention to detail and meeting all deadlines consistently.

- **Communication Skills** — Strong verbal and written communication to brief crews, manage client expectations, and coordinate between stakeholders.

- **Creative Vision** — Understanding of video production processes, formats, and quality standards to provide meaningful direction to filming crews and editors.

- **Problem-Solving** — Proactive approach to identifying potential issues before they impact timelines and developing solutions quickly.

- **Quality Assurance** — Keen eye for detail to ensure all footage and final deliverables meet professional standards and client specifications.

- **Technology Proficiency** — Comfortable using AI tools for footage organization, project management software, and various communication platforms.

- **Client Relations** — Manage client expectations, handle feedback professionally, and maintain positive relationships throughout the project lifecycle.

- **Leadership** — Guide and motivate external contractors and tea
mbers to deliver their best work consistently.



---



**TIME & SCHEDULE**



- Freedom to make your own schedule while ensuring all project deadlines are consistently met

- Available during standard business hours (9 AM – 6 PM) in your timezone for client communication and team coordination

- Approximately 30–35 hours per week depending on active project volume

- Must be available for filming day coordination, which may occasionally fall on weekends

- Remote with occasional on-location presence required for complex shoots



---



**COMPENSATION**



- Base salary: $1,500 – $3,000/month based on experience and performance

- Performance bonus: $200 per project delivered on time with zero revisions

- Retention bonus: $500 quarterly for maintaining 90%+ client satisfaction scores

- Paid monthly via Stripe or preferred payment method



---



**WORK ENVIRONMENT**



- Remote with access to project management tools (Notion, Slack or similar)

- Must have reliable internet and professional communication setup

- Access to video review software and AI tools for footage organization

- Regular communication via Slack,
, and video calls with clients and tea
mbers

title: Short-Form TECHNICAL X/Twitter/LinkedIn Writer
description:
Company: Nebula



Type: Full-time, Remote



Start Date: Immediate

About Nebula

Nebula is an AI agent platform that helps people automate their work using natural language. We're building our brand presence on X/Twitter and need someone who lives and breathes the platform.



The Role

You'll own Nebula's X/Twitter presence — writing daily posts, threads, and replies that grow our following and establish us as a voice in the AI/developer tools space. You need to understand the culture of tech
: the #buildinpublic community, dev humor, AI discourse, and what makes posts go viral in this niche.



This is a writing-heavy role. You're not scheduling posts someone else wrote — you're the voice.



What You'll Do

Write and publish 3-5 original posts per day across Nebula's X account

Create 2-3 threads per week (product updates, AI insights, behind-the-scenes)

Engage with replies, quote tweets, and relevant conversations in the AI/dev community

Monitor trending topics in AI/tech and newsjack when relevant

Write copy for product launches, feature announcements, and campaigns

Track engagement metrics and double down on what performs

Collaborate with the team on content calendar and brand voice



Requirements

Writing samples required — share your X/Twitter profile or 5-10 sample tweets/threads in the AI/tech voice

Native or near-native English writing skills

Deep familiarity with X/Twitter culture, especially tech/AI/startup communities

Understanding of AI tools and developer workflows (you should know what an API, LLM, and AI agent are)

Ability to distill complex technical concepts into punchy, engaging tweets

Self-starter who can generate ideas without constant direction

Available to post during US business hours (Pacific Time overlap preferred)



Nice to Have

Personal X/Twitter account with 
+ followers in tech/AI niche

Experience with #buildinpublic or startup content

Familiarity with
 
 tools

Basic graphic design for tweet images (Canva/Figma)

Experience managing brand accounts (not just personal)

Knowledge of AI agent platforms, coding assistants, or automation tools



Voice & Tone Guide

Our
 voice is:

Sharp, not corporate — "We just shipped something wild" not "We're excited to announce"

Technical but accessible — developers should nod, non-devs should still get it

Opinionated — we have takes on AI, not just announcements

Community-first — we reply, we engage, we're in the conversation

Sample Task (Include in Your Application)



Write 5 sample tweets as if you were running Nebula's account today. Include:

1 product-focused tweet (check nebula.gg for context)

1 industry hot take about AI agents

1 engagement/question tweet to spark replies

1 thread opener (first tweet of a thread)

1 reply to a hypothetical user who says "what even is an AI agent?"



How to Apply

Subject line: 
 Writer Application - [Your Name]"

Writing samples: Your X profile link OR 5-10 sample tweets/threads

Brief intro: Who you are, your timezone, and your relationship with tech

The 5 sample tweets described above



Availability: When you can start

Applications without writing samples will not be reviewed.

title: Operations & Admin Coordinator (CRM, Lead Intake, Payroll & KPI Tracking)
description:
Job Description:



We are a roofing and solar company based in Vancouver, Canada looking for a reliable and detail-oriented Operations & Admin Coordinator to support our daily operations.



This is a key role in the company. You will be responsible for handling incoming leads, maintaining our CRM system, assisting with invoicing and payroll, and tracking company and employee KPIs.



Accuracy, organization, and consistency are extremely important in this role.



Responsibilities:



1. Lead Intake & Call Handling (Top Priority)



Answer incoming calls (approx. 2–10 per day)

Collect accurate customer information (name, phone, address, job details)

Enter all leads into the CRM immediately

Ensure no leads are missed or incomplete

Communicate clearly and professionally with customers



2. CRM Management



Maintain accurate and organized customer/job records

Update job statuses and assign leads

Ensure all data is complete and up to date



3. Invoicing & Payments



Create and send invoices (QuickBooks or similar)

Track payments and update records

Follow up on unpaid invoices



4. Payroll Support



Prepare payroll data (hours, tracking, coordination)

Ensure accuracy before processing

Maintain organized payroll records



5. KPI Tracking & Reporting



Track company KPIs (leads, sales, job performance)

Track employee KPIs (production, efficiency, performance)

Maintain simple daily/weekly reports



6. General Admin



Fill out forms and documents

Keep systems organized and up to date

Requirements:

Strong attention to detail

Highly organized and reliable

Good spoken and written English

Experience with CRM systems

Experience with invoicing (QuickBooks or similar)

Basic understanding of payroll processes

Comfortable using Excel or Google Sheets

Work Schedule:

Monday to Friday

8:00 AM – 4:00 PM Vancouver, Canada time

Night shift in the Philippines

Must be available during these hours consistently

Compensation:

$800 – $1,000 USD per month (depending on experience)

Up to $100/month performance bonus based on:

Accurate lead handling (no missed or incomplete leads)

Clean and organized CRM

Accurate invoicing and payroll support

Timely KPI tracking and reporting

To Apply:



Please include:



Your experience with CRM systems

Your experience with invoicing and payroll

What tools you’ve used for tracking data

Answer this question:

“What steps would you take when answering a call from a new customer?”

title: Digital Marketing & Growth Specialist (SEO + Google Ads + Landing Pages)

To Apply:

Examples of websites or projects you’ve worked on

Your experience with SEO and Google Ads

A short audit of 
 (2–3 improvements you would make)

title: Inventory and Supply Chain Business Analyst (Advanced Excel knowledge required) - Virtual Assistant - WFH
description:
KeyTiger, a US-based e-commerce business in the home décor/interior design industry, is seeking highly-motivated and competent individuals to join our remote team. If you have high attention-to-detail, possess excellent English communication skills, and are interested in a full time work from home / online position, apply now!



Position: Business Analyst (20+ POSITIONS OPEN)

Work Schedule: 5AM-1PM Manila Time, Tue-Sat

Salary: $500 to $1,300* monthly



Benefits include:

- Holidays: Paid US Public Holidays

- Paid Time Off: 11 accrued personal days off per year

- Growth: Bonus and salary increase depending on performance



Primary Responsibilities

1. Supply chain and vendor support

2. Full product definition, inventory and price analysis

3. Creating purchase orders

4. Bookkeeping (quarterly reports, sales tax)

5. Digital advertising



Requirements

1. Excellent spoken and written English skills

2. Stable, high-speed internet connection

3. Willingness to be trained and work with us long-term (must have no other job obligations)

4. Advanced knowledge in Microsoft Excel – IMPORTANT: Only proceed if you have advanced knowledge in Excel and are used to dealing with a LARGE set of data in a highly detailed manner. Just knowing SUM or IF formulas and pivot tables will not be enough. This position is most suited for candidates who have used Excel for multiple years and know the true depths of how complicated Excel is. Knowledge of VBA is an advantage.



*Published salary is for starting only. Multiple salary increases within a year are possible in order to match an employee's skill level.



INSTRUCTIONS ON HOW TO APPLY



 the requirements below to 

1. The most recent copy of your resume (as a file attachment)

2. Your complete name and phone number



Note: Use the job title as the subject of your
, e.g. "Business Analyst".



IMPORTANT (You must reply to the
): You will receive an autoreply with a few questions immediately after sending your
 application. If you don't get an autoreply within 1-2 minutes, check your spam/junk folder or message us at 
/KeyTigerRecruitmentPage.



Tell your friends about this job opening for a chance to receive a REFERRAL BONUS of $300! For more information, go to

title: Ad Creator & Video Editor (Affiliate Marketing – Short Form Ads) Platform
description:
About Us

We are a fast-moving content and creative team focused on producing high-performing social media content and advertisements across multiple industries, including online gaming, fintech, supplements, and software. Our approach is simple: create engaging content, test quickly, and scale what works.



Role Overview

We are looking for a content creator who can produce scroll-stopping social media content and visually compelling advertisements. This role combines short-form video editing with graphic design to create content that captures attention and drives engagement and conversions.



You should understand how to structure content for platforms like TikTok, Instagram Reels, and YouTube Shorts, while also being able to design clean, modern visuals for ads.



Responsibilities

Create short-form video content (15–60 seconds) for social platforms

Edit engaging, fast-paced, trend-driven videos

Design graphics and visual assets for ads and posts

Produce talking-head, lifestyle, and UGC-style content

Incorporate current trends, 
s, and platform-native formats

Use AI tools to generate content and enhance production

Create multiple variations for testing and iteration

Refine content based on performance feedback

Maintain clean, error-free English across all content



Required Skills

Strong video editing and basic graphic design skills

Understanding of social media content that performs

Ability to create strong hooks and clear calls-to-action

Good sense of pacing, storytelling, and visual flow

Excellent English (clear and correct grammar required)

Self-sufficient and able to execute quickly



Preferred Skills

Experience with CapCut or similar tools

Experience with AI content creation tools

Background in social media marketing or advertising

Experience in gaming, fintech, supplements, or software content



Compensation

$2/hour starting rate (part-time)

Opportunities to scale into full-time based on performance



How to Apply

Send the following:

– Video/content portfolio (required – direct links only)

– Examples of social media content or ads you’ve created

– List of tools you use (especially editing + AI tools)

– Weekly availability



Applications without a portfolio will not be considered.

title: Virtual Digital Marketing Assistant (Cebu-Based, Female)
description:
About the Role:



We’re on the lookout for a talented Virtual Digital Marketing Assistant to join our all-female team in Cebu. Initially, you’ll start full-time in-office, and as you settle in and shine, we’ll happily shift you into a hybrid role.



What You’ll Be Doing:



You’ll wear a few creative hats! From crafting engaging content for social media to putting together articles with a bit of AI assistance, you’ll be right at home in the digital space. You’ll also dip your toes into some basic video editing—prepping content for different platforms and placements.



What We’re Looking For:



Digital Marketing Basics: A solid grasp of social media, content creation, and general digital marketing know-how.



Excellent English & Communication: You’ll be writing and possibly communicating with clients, so strong English skills are key.



AI & CRM Familiarity: Knowing your way around AI writing tools and a CRM like Go High Level (or being eager to learn) is a definite plus.



Video Editing: Some basic video editing skills to get content polished and ready for different channels.



Design & Funnels: Experience with funnels or design tools is a bonus.



Team Player: You’ll be part of a supportive all-female team, with training provided by a digital marketing agency to help you level up.



Why You’ll Love It:

You’ll have room to grow, a chance to learn, and the opportunity to eventually enjoy a hybrid work setup. If you’re ready to build your skills in a fun and supportive environment, we’d love to hear from you!

title: Guest Experience & Operations Manager (Short-Term Rentals)
description:
Job Title: Guest Experience & Operations Manager (Short-Term Rentals)



Company: CrownKey BNB



Location: Remote / Virtual



Position Type: Part-Time (with opportunity to grow)



?



About Us



CrownKey BNB is a growing short-term rental and corporate housing company focused on delivering a seamless, high-quality guest experience. We host a variety of guests including business travelers, flight crews, and leisure travelers, and pride ourselves on professionalism, efficiency, and hospitality.



?

?

 • Track and manage all guest check-ins and check-outs

?



Qualifications

 • Strong organizational and time management skills

 • Excellent communication and customer service abilities

 • Experience with Google Sheets / spreadsheets

 • Basic bookkeeping knowledge preferred

 • Ability to multitask and manage multiple properties/guests

 • Problem-solver with attention to detail

 • Must be coachable and willing to learn systems/processes

 • Previous experience in Airbnb, hospitality, or property management is a plus



?



Compensation

 • Competitive hourly pay (based on experience)

 • Performance-based bonuses available



?



Why Join CrownKey BNB?

 • Be part of a team focused on excellence and guest satisfaction



?



How to Apply



Please submit:

 • A short message explaining your experience and why you’d be a great fit

title: Canva & AI Designer – 40,000 PHP/month
description:
Full-Time | 40,000 PHP per month



If you love design and enjoy experimenting with AI tools, this role is for you!

title: Meta Ads Execution Specialist (Part-Time)
description:
About Us



How To Apply



Please reply to this job post with the following:

1. A brief summary of your Meta Ads experience, including typical monthly budgets.

2. Screenshots or summaries of 2 to 3 campaigns you have managed (goal, budget, structure, and results).

3. One paragraph on how you normally set up tracking (pixel, events, CAPI) for a lead gen funnel.

4. Your part-time hourly rate and full-time monthly rate, respectively.



We’re a programming education company that helps experienced software engineers build real-world Rust projects and land Rust roles. We run a high-ticket, cohort-based accelerator plus self-paced training, and reach engineers through YouTube,
, and partnerships.



Role Overview

We are looking for a part-time Meta Ads Operator to implement and maintain our
 and Instagram campaigns. This is an execution-focused role: you will take clear targeting and creative direction from the founder and marketing team, then handle setup, tracking, and ongoing optimizations inside Meta Ads Manager.



Ideal for someone who enjoys clean accounts, accurate tracking, and making data-driven tweaks, not sitting in branding meetings.



Key Responsibilities

1. Implement and maintain Meta Pixel and Conversion API across our funnels (waitlist, applications, bookings, purchases).

2. Set up campaigns, ad sets, and ads according to provided specs (objectives, budgets, audiences, and creatives).

3. Create and manage custom and lookalike audiences from our traffic,
 list, and engaged users.

4. Monitor performance daily on weekdays and execute simple rules: pause obvious losers, keep winners within defined guardrails, and flag issues quickly.

5. Run basic A/B tests on creatives and audiences following our testing framework.

6. Ensure tracking events fire correctly on all key steps and troubleshoot when they do not.

7. Produce a concise weekly report (spend, cost per waitlist opt-in, cost per application, cost per call, cost per student) with 2 to 3 clear recommendations.



You Are A Good Fit If

1. You have 1 to 3 years of hands-on experience running Meta Ads (lead gen or info/education experience is a plus).

2. You are comfortable with Meta Ads Manager, Pixel, standard events, and basic CAPI.

3. You can read numbers and make simple performance-based decisions without drama.

4. You are organized, responsive, and document what you do so others can follow it.

5. You can overlap at least 2 to 3 hours per day with US time zones.

6. You’re currently freelancing or working part time and want a long term core client, not just a one-off project.



This Role Is Not

1. Not a creative director or copywriter (we have a content and
 team).

2. Not a CMO or growth strategist d
 offers, funnels, or pricing.

3. Not a general social media manager (no organic posting, community management, or influencer work).



Scope & Engagement

1. Part-time contractor.

2. We’ll start at 5–10 hours/week for the first 60–90 days while we validate and scale Meta.

3. We guarantee a minimum of 20 hours/month, paid monthly, so your time is predictable.

4. If performance is strong and we scale ad spend, this role can grow into 15–20+ hours/week and potentially a full-time PH position.

5. Remote, flexible schedule as long as SLAs are met and campaigns are monitored on weekdays.



How To Apply



Please reply to this job post with the following:

1. A brief summary of your Meta Ads experience, including typical monthly budgets.

2. Screenshots or summaries of 2 to 3 campaigns you have managed (goal, budget, structure, and results).

3. One paragraph on how you normally set up tracking (pixel, events, CAPI) for a lead gen funnel.

4. Your part-time hourly rate and full-time monthly rate, respectively.

title: Architect (Multi-Residential Experience Required) | Advanced Revit | Brisbane-Based Architecture Firm
description:
Advanced Revit | Full-Time | Brisbane Projects



Location: Remote – Philippines

Employment Type: Full-Time (40 Hours Per Week)

Projects: Brisbane & South East Queensland, Australia



About the Opportunity



Paul Group Virtual is recruiting on behalf of a well-established and highly reputable Architecture Firm based in Brisbane, Queensland.



The firm specialises in multi-residential and mixed-use developments across South East Queensland and is seeking a Licensed Architect with strong multi-residential experience to join their team in a full-time offshore capacity.



This is a long-term position supporting Australian projects and working directly with senior architects and project directors.





Mandatory Requirements - READ CAREFULLY!!

* Licensed Architect

* Proven Australian project experience

* Minimum 5+ years professional experience

* Strong multi-residential background

* Advanced Revit proficiency (non-negotiable)

* Experience producing full construction documentation packages

* Ability to work full-time (40 hours per week)

* Experience producing multi-residential documentation sets





Project Scope

You will be involved in:

- Medium to high-density apartment developments

- Mixed-use residential buildings

- Townhouse projects

- Design development through to construction documentation



You must be confident delivering accurate, buildable documentation aligned with Australian standards.



Key Responsibilities

* Produce high-quality documentation using Revit

* Develop compliant design models

* Coordinate consultant documentation (structural, hydraulic, services)

* Ensure compliance with NCC/BCA and relevant codes

* Maintain documentation accuracy and meet project deadlines

* Participate in online coordination meetings







Technical Requirements

* 4–5+ years advanced Revit experience

* Strong construction detailing knowledge

* Understanding of Australian compliance frameworks

* Ability to work independently and manage deadlines

* Stable high-speed internet connection







Employment Details

* Long-term secure engagement

* Direct collaboration with senior architects in Brisbane

* Competitive hourly rate (AUD, based on experience)

* Paid weekly







Application Requirements

Applications will only be considered if you meet ALL of the following:



1. Short video or Loom introduction - answering these questions below:

      - Are you a Licensed Architect? Where are you registered?

      - How many years of Australian project experience do you have?

      - Describe your multi-residential experience.

      - Have you produced full construction documentation sets?

      - Confirmation of years of Revit experience



2. Submit a Multi-residential drawing samples (PDF) - HIGHLY RECOMMENDED

3. Submit yout Resume (Ensure it is accessible)

4. What is your requested hourly rate (AUD)?

5. Are you available full-time (40 hours per week)?





Submit a complete and serious application — this role can lead to long-term work and career growth with a trusted Australian firm.

title: Appointment setter
description:
Are you a persuasive communicator who speaks fluent English? Do you thrive in a fast-paced environment where your effort directly impacts your paycheck?



At USA WINDOWS & DOORS , we don't just sell windows and doors—we provide peace of mind and home security through premium impact-resistant solutions. We are looking for a high-energy Bilingual Appointment Setter to join our growth engine and turn potential leads into thriving opportunities.



The Mission

As our Appointment Setter, you are the first point of contact for our future customers. Your goal is to spark interest, qualify homeowners, and schedule high-quality consultations for our expert sales team.



What You’ll Do:

Drive Outreach: Make 120+ outbound calls per day to homeowners from our provided lead lists.



Qualify & Connect: Identify customer needs and educate them on the value of impact-resistant upgrades.



Manage Your Pipeline: Schedule appointments, follow up via text/email, and keep our CRM (Customer Relationship Management) system updated and organized.



Crush Targets: Meet and exceed daily/weekly booking goals to maximize your earning potential.



Who You Are:

Sales-Minded: You have previous experience in telemarketing, sales, or appointment setting.

Persuasive & Professional: You have a confident phone presence and can turn a "maybe" into a "yes."

Goal-Oriented: You aren't intimidated by high-volume calling; you see every call as a new chance to win.

Tech-Savvy: Comfortable using CRMs and basic computer tools.



What’s In It For You?

Guaranteed Base: $400 USD Monthly Base Salary.

Uncapped Potential: Competitive commission structure—the more you book, the more you earn.

Stability: Join a booming industry with high demand year-round.

Growth: We value talent and provide a supportive environment where you can sharpen your sales skills.



Ready to join a winning team?

If you have the drive and the voice to lead the way, we want to talk to you.



Apply now and let’s start protecting homes together!

title: Experienced Web Designer – Figma, Elementor & AI Workflows
description:
Milkyway Is Hiring



Are you the creative and performance-driven Web Designer we’re looking for?



Are you a designer who doesn’t just make things look good—but understands how design drives user experience, conversions, and business results?



Do you enjoy turning ideas into polished, high-performing websites using both strong design fundamentals and modern AI tools to work smarter?



If you bring creativity, speed, structure, and strategic thinking into your work, this could be your next role.



About Milkyway



Milkyway is a digital agency helping businesses grow through strategy, branding, websites, content, and digital marketing.



We partner with founders, small business owners, and established brands to elevate how they show up online—with design that is both beautiful and functional.



We’re growing quickly and are looking for a Web Designer who can deliver high-quality creative work while contributing to a strong, efficient delivery team.



ABOUT YOU



The ideal person wants to grow with us, take ownership of design quality, and contribute to a high-performing creative team.



You are:

• Highly creative with a strong eye for modern, conversion-focused design.  

• Confident using Figma for web layouts, wireframing, and UI/UX design.  

• Experienced in WordPress and Elementor, capable of building and updating high-quality websites.  

• Strong in Adobe Photoshop (Illustrator is a plus) and comfortable using Canva for fast execution.  

• Able to take a brief and turn it into clean, well-structured, high-performing designs.  

• Proactive—bringing ideas, not just execution.  

• Organised, detail-oriented, and reliable with deadlines.  

• A problem solver who can think through UX, layout, and usability challenges.  

• A clear communicator who works well with designers, developers, and marketers.  

• Committed to continuous improvement in both design and systems.  



Experience Requirements:  

• Minimum 2 years experience working in a digital agency environment (required).  

• Proven experience working across multiple client projects and industries.  



 AI + DESIGN CAPABILITY (IMPORTANT)



We’re looking for a designer who understands both traditional design fundamentals and AI-assisted workflows.



You should:

• Have strong design skills without relying on AI tools.  

• Be experienced in using AI (e.g. ChatGPT or similar tools) in a professional setting to support ideation, copy structuring, wireframing support, and workflow efficiency.  

• Know how to refine and improve AI-generated outputs to meet high design standards.  

• Understand when to use AI—and when manual design thinking is required.  



If you rely entirely on AI to produce your work without understanding design principles, this role is not a fit.



 ABOUT THE ROLE



This role reports directly to the founder and works closely with the delivery and operations team.



You will:

• Design website layouts, UI elements, and digital assets using Figma.  

• Build and execute high-quality websites in WordPress (Elementor).  

• Create supporting assets such as
 creatives, banners, and social media graphics.  

• Support branding projects and assist in developing visual identities.  

• Handle WordPress updates, content changes, and visual improvements.  

• Maintain clean and organised design systems across Figma, Adobe, and Canva.  

• Contribute ideas in team discussions and project planning.  

• Ensure all design output is accurate, on-brand, and delivered on time.  



 WORK SETUP



This is a remote role, ideally suited to someone who can work within or close to Australian (Brisbane) business hours.



We’re looking for someone who wants to be part of a growing agency and contribute meaningfully to client success—not just complete tasks.



It needs to be a genuine yes from both sides.



WHAT YOU’LL GET



A supportive, growth-focused environment where your creativity and ideas genuinely matter.



• A collaborative and professional team culture  

• Clear systems and expectations to support high-quality work  

• Training and onboarding to help you succeed in the role  

• Opportunities to grow your skills in design, UX/UI, and digital strategy  

• Exposure to a wide range of industries and creative projects  

• Flexibility and trust in how you manage your work  



We believe great design drives real business results—for our clients and our team.



HOW TO APPLY



If this role sounds like a strong fit, we’d love to hear from you.



• Include the word “Stardust” creatively in your application  

• Attach your portfolio and resume  

• Include at least 3 professional references in your resume  



If you know someone who would be a great fit, feel free to pass this opportunity along.



We look forward to meeting the Web Designer who will help elevate our clients’ brands and digital presence.

title: CONTENT SPECIALIST
description:
Are you the creative and strategic Content Specialist we’re looking for?

Are you a strong writer who can turn ideas into clear, compelling content that actually performs and not just reads well? Do you enjoy blending strategy, data, and creativity to drive real business results?



If you take pride in your craft, think beyond just writing, and know how to use both traditional content skills and modern AI tools to produce better outcomes, this could be the role for you.



About Milkyway

Milkyway is a digital agency helping businesses grow through strategy, branding, websites, content, and digital marketing. We work closely with our clients to bring clarity to their messaging and consistency to how they show up online.



We’re growing quickly and are now looking for a Content Specialist to join our team.



ABOUT YOU

The ideal person wants to grow with us, take ownership of content quality, and elevate how our clients communicate.

You are:

• A confident writer with strong attention to detail and structure.  

• Comfortable creating content across websites, social media,
 marketing, SEO, and ads.  

• Strategic—you understand that content exists to drive outcomes, not just fill space.  

• Organised and able to manage content calendars and deadlines independently.  

• Experienced in maintaining and adapting brand voice across different platforms.  

• Familiar with SEO principles and writing for search intent.  

• Curious about performance and motivated to improve content based on data.  

• Proactive with ideas and comfortable contributing in planning sessions.  

• Accountable, reliable, and consistent in delivering high-quality work.  



AI + Content Capability 

We’re looking for someone who:

• Has strong foundational writing skills without relying on AI.  

• Knows how to use AI tools (e.g. ChatGPT or similar) to enhance speed, research, ideation, and optimisation—not replace thinking.  

• Can refine, edit, and elevate AI-generated outputs into high-quality, on-brand content.  

• Understands when to use AI—and when not to.  

If you rely entirely on AI to write for you, this role is not a fit. If you know how to leverage AI as a tool while maintaining quality and originality, you’ll thrive here.



ABOUT THE ROLE

The Content Specialist reports directly to the CEO and works closely with the wider team to support marketing and growth initiatives.

You will:

• Create high-quality website content, blog posts, landing pages, and SEO content.  

• Write engaging social media and
 marketing content aligned to brand voice.  

• Develop ad copy to support paid campaigns across multiple platforms.  

• Plan and manage content calendars across channels.  

• Maintain and apply brand style guides consistently.  

• Review and optimise existing content for clarity, performance, and SEO.  

• Analyse content performance and provide insights and recommendations.  

• Support campaign launches with coordinated content across channels.  

• Collaborate with designers, web developers, and marketing specialists.  



WORK SETUP

This is a remote role, ideally suited to someone who can work within or close to Australian business hours.

We’re looking for someone who wants to be part of a growing agency and contribute meaningfully to client success. It needs to be a genuine yes from both sides.



WHAT YOU’LL GET

A supportive, growth-focused environment where your writing and ideas genuinely matter.

• A collaborative and professional team culture  

• Clear systems and processes to support high-quality work  

• Training and onboarding to help you succeed in the role  

• Opportunities to develop your skills across content, SEO, and strategy  

• Exposure to a wide range of industries and content types  

• Flexibility and trust in how you manage your work  

We believe great content drives great outcomes—for our clients and our team.



HOW TO APPLY

If this role sounds like a strong fit, we’d love to hear from you.



Include the word “Stardust” creatively in your application so we know you’ve read this in full.  

Add a link to your portfolio and resume.



If you know someone who would be a great fit, feel free to pass this opportunity along.

We look forward to meeting the Content Specialist who will help take our clients’ messaging and performance to the next level.

title: Instagram DM Setter + Facebook Group Manager
description:
We're a US-based digital marketing agency looking for a driven, detail-oriented person to help with two key tasks:



Role 1: DM Setting (4-5 hours/day)

You'll be reaching out to potential clients through Instagram DMs on behalf of our agency. You'll be given lead lists, scripts, and training — your job is to engage prospects, qualify them, and book sales calls for our team.



• Send 100 personalized DMs per day

• Follow proven scripts and qualify leads

• Send voice notes and personalized messages

• Book qualified prospects onto our sales calendar

• Track all activity in a Google Sheet

• Notify our team via Slack when a lead is qualified or a call is booked



Compensation: 25% commission on every deal that closes. Minimum client value is $1,500/month, so minimum commission per close is $375+. Bonuses available for top performance.



Role 2:
 Group Management (3 hours/day)

You'll apply to join local business
 groups, post pre-written content once per day, reply to comments, engage with members, and forward any leads to our team.



• Apply to join targeted
 groups

• Post pre-written content (we create the posts)

• Reply to comments and engage naturally

• Forward all leads to our team via Slack

• Light community engagement (likes, comments, replies)



Compensation: $4/hour (3 hours/day = $12/day) + 10% commission on any deal that closes from
 group leads.



Total daily time commitment: 7-8 hours



Requirements:



• Excellent written English

• Experience with Instagram DMs or social media outreach

• Reliable internet connection

• Available to work US business hours (Central Time)

• Detail-oriented and organized

• Comfortable using Google Sheets, Slack, and Loom



What we provide:



• Full scripts and training

• Daily lead lists

• All content for
 group posts

• Slack access for team communication

• Clear SOPs for everything



This is a long-term position for the right person. If you're hungry, reliable, and want to grow with a fast-moving agency, apply now.
